name: American Update
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0049%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=h%2bl7uZ%2b%2fdnKafTX1oFyxtA&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40280%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tSTQir6Z6ems%2bzaPcYYEJw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” - Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” - Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE -starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40281%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dufe97I1uVAQjD50Tb5obQ&sysid=1)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0049%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=h%2bl7uZ%2b%2fdnKafTX1oFyxtA&sysid=1)_

Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Midterms update (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Friends,
Let me start by saying this: We have a _lot_ to celebrate after the midterm elections.
**November 8 was a _fantastic_ night for women governors across the country.** My dear friend Kathy Hochul was elected the first woman governor of New York State! Governors Gretchen Whitmer in Michigan, Michelle Lujan Grisham in New Mexico, Janet Mills in Maine and Laura Kelly in Kansas have all been re-elected. And we made history by sending Democrats Maura Healey in Massachusetts, Katie Hobbs in Arizona and Tina Kotek in Oregon to the governors' mansions in their states.
**Democrats retained our Senate majority! John Fetterman flipped Pennsylvania’s Senate seat blue, and we re-elected Senators Maggie Hassan, Catherine Cortez Masto, and Mark Kelly.** And while Cheri Beasley in North Carolina, Val Demings in Florida, Mandela Barnes in Wisconsin and Tim Ryan in Ohio fell short, they each ran history-making campaigns—and have bright futures ahead of them.
**With your support, Off the Sidelines candidates like Rep. Sharice Davids in Kansas, Rep. Elissa Slotkin in Michigan and Rep. Lauren Underwood in Illinois won seriously tough re-election fights.** The “red tsunami” that MAGA Republicans predicted is nowhere to be found.
Still—we have a lot of work left to do.
**My friend, Senator Raphael Warnock, is headed to a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker. Rev. Warnock needs a major surge in grassroots support to hold this critical seat and expand our 50-50 Senate majority.**
**[I promised Rev. Warnock that this team could raise $30,000 by midnight _tonight_ to send critical resources to Georgia. Please—will you chip in as much as you can afford right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54812809/379754048/1384586616?refcode=jtk3797-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE2MjVjMy0xNzY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_UCZimE8tOXlY-0BMETBaGnIaob2wAkpkZYMHMQsmk=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54812811/379754053/1384586616?refcode=jtk3797-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE2MjVjMy0xNzY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_UCZimE8tOXlY-0BMETBaGnIaob2wAkpkZYMHMQsmk=)**
Thank you for stepping up now—we’re down to the wire and your support could make-or-break this critical race.
More soon,
Kirsten
Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate

| _**RUNOFF ELECTION TRIGGERED**_
**Election Day: Dec 6th**

**Herschel Walker needs your support to win the final race of 2022!**
---

I know I’ve asked a lot from you, Friend. But the 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat simply isn’t an option.

We wanted to win this race outright. But we battled back from a double-digit deficit this summer and forced a runoff in Georgia. That’s all thanks to you.

---
This has been a long and grueling campaign. I can’t thank you enough for sticking it out to the end. But I’m asking you to dig deep one last time and help Herschel Walker stay in this fight.

Herschel’s cash reserves are depleted, and liberal mega-donors are preparing to funnel **MILLIONS** into Raphael Warnock’s campaign fund.

body: Fighting for FBI and Big Bank January 6 Records [INSIDE JW] San Francisco DA Won't Release Details of Paul Pelosi Assault [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=28466&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9CMGd2TWV3bkt3VT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] An attack on the spouse of the Speaker of the House is of considerable interest, but the San Francisco district attorney refused to provide documents and video [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=28462&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BhdWwtcGVsb3NpLWFzc2F1bHQtcmVjb3Jkcy0yMDIyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] of the police activity at the home of Paul Pelosi, Nancy Pelosi’s husband, where David Wayne DePape was arrested following an alleged assault on October 28, 2022. Among the items District Attorney Brooke Jenkins refused to release are a recording of Paul Pelosi’s 911 call and police officers’ body camera footage. Nikki Moore, assistant district attorney, took the unusual step of providing some details about the incident response to our California Public Records Act request: > The two persons present at the Pelosi home when the SFPD arrived > where [sic] Mr. Pelosi and Mr. DePape. Please see the online posted > document that reflects that Mr. Pelosi was the only person in the > home at the time of the attack. See > https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=28463&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vaW50ZXJhY3RpdmUvMjAyMi8xMS8wMS91cy9kYXZpZC1kZS1wYXBlLW1vdGlvbi10by1kZXRhaW4uaHRtbD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=. > You can obtain an official copy of this court record from the > Superior Court. In our November 2022 request to the district attorney, we noted a news report stating that news organizations had been rebuffed on similar requests and, pursuant to the California Public Records Act, we asked for, in addition to the recording and camera footage: All records of communications, including emails and text messages, between the District Attorney’s Office and the San Francisco Police Department concerning the incident. We also asked for communications with several federal agencies, including the Justice Department, the Capitol Police, and the FBI. And we asked for the identities of the persons at the Pelosi home at the time of the incident. In declining the information we requested, Assistant DA Moore cited Section 6254 of California law, which governs records requests, and specifically subsection (f), which allows for the withholding from the public of certain “records of investigations conducted by the Office of the Attorney General and the Department of Justice, the Office of Emergency Services and any state or local police agency ...” There is significant public interest in the terrible attack on Paul Pelosi and it is odd that the local authorities are withholding basic information about the incident. In our previous work, in September, we received [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=28174&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGF1bC1wZWxvc2ktYXJyZXN0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] records from the California Highway Patrol Public Records Unit that included 44 photos and five hours of audio/video footage depicting the misconduct and arrest of Paul Pelosi. The material shows that Mr. Pelosi invoked his wife’s name and shared his police charity membership during the arrest for suspected alcohol intoxication while driving. JUDICIAL WATCH APPEAL SEEKS FBI JANUARY 6 COMMUNICATIONS WITH BANKS We are pushing back on the attempt to curtail our investigation into the full details about the January 6 disturbance. We want the details about what looks to be an unprecedented abuse of the financial privacy of countless innocent Americans by big banks and the FBI. We filed an appeal challenging a U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia decision allowing the FBI to withhold records of communication between the FBI and several financial institutions about the reported transfer of financial transaction records of people in DC, Maryland and Virginia on January 5 and January 6, 2021 (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=28458&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWZiaS1iYW5rcy1hcHBlYWwtNTIwOS0wMTIxNi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE] (No. 22-5209). The FBI’s cover-up should be rejected, and the records made public. Our appeal, filed in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia, comes in the FOIA lawsuit [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=27401&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmFuay1kYXRhLWphbi02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] we filed after the FBI failed to respond to a February 10, 2021, FOIA request (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice_ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=25271&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWphbi0yMDIxLWJhbmstcmVxdWVzdHMtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxMjE2L11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA== _(No. 1:21-cv-01216)). We are asking for: > All records of communication between the FBI and any financial > institution, including but not limited to Bank of America, Citibank, > Chase Manhattan Bank, Discover, and/or American Express, in which > the FBI sought transaction data for those financial institutions’ > debit and credit card account holders who made purchases in > Washington, DC, Maryland and/or Virginia on January 5, 2021, and/or > January 6, 2021. In our appellate brief, we argue: > This appeal arises from what appears to be an unprecedented abuse of > the financial privacy of thousands of Americans. Substantial and > compelling evidence demonstrates that the FBI sought and received > records from financial institutions of anyone who used a credit card > or engaged in other transactions in the Washington, D.C. area on > January 5 or 6, 2021. This would include many thousands of persons > living in the Washington, DC area, including possibly members of > this Court. In our appeal we point out that the lower court was mistaken when it upheld [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=28459&F=T&] the FBI’s _Glomar _response (neither confirming nor denying the existence of records) because the FBI previously acknowledged the existence of the records in multiple ways. For instance, court records filed in support of a criminal case include the FBI’s statement of facts that provides the defendant’s address, which was obtained through “his Bank of America account and recent Expedia transactions.” In another case, the FBI “confirmed that it obtained records from PNC Bank and discusses in detail the multiple ways that it used the financial data.” Additionally, “financial records obtained from JP Morgan Chase bank corroborate [the defendant] used a credit card issued in his name to purchase gas and food enroute to Washington, DC ...” We cite two additional cases where the FBI describes in publicly available court records its use of financial records in the January 6 investigation. We conclude: > [Judicial Watch] more than adequately demonstrated that the FBI may > have sought and received records from financial institutions of > anyone who used a credit card or engaged in other transactions in > the Washington, DC area on January 5 or 6. If so, this would be an > unprecedented abuse of the financial privacy of thousands of > Americans. [Judicial Watch’s] FOIA request to investigate this > should not be blocked by a meritless _Glomar_ response. We are engaged in a comprehensive, independent investigation into the January 6 disturbance. In February 2022, we filed an opposition [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=26729&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcGVsb3NpLWNvbmdyZXNzLWNsYWltcy1pbW11bml0eS1pbi1jb3VydC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE] to the U.S. Capitol Police’s (USCP) effort to shut down Judicial Watch’s federal lawsuit for January 6 videos and emails. Through its police department, Congress argues [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=26725&F=T&] that the videos and emails are not public records, there is no public interest in their release, and that “sovereign immunity” prevents citizens from suing for their release. And we recently sued [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=28250&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3Vlcy11bmNvdmVyLWRldGFpbHMtYXNobGktYmFiYml0dHMtc2hvb3RlcnMtc3BlY2lhbC1ob3VzaW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] the U.S. Department of Defense and U.S. Department of Justice for records related to the housing of U.S. Capitol Police Lieutenant Michael Byrd at Joint Base Andrews after he shot and killed U.S. Air Force veteran Ashli Babbitt inside the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021. TSA DIRECTOR ACCUSED OF UNLAWFULLY DEPLOYING ASSETS TO MEXICAN BORDER The Biden administration’s open border policy is creating internal government confusion. The Air Marshal National Council accuses Transportation Security Administration (TSA) of violating federal law and overstepping their authority for assigning air marshals to assist with the illegal immigration crisis. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=28467&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHNhLWRpcmVjdG9yLWd1aWx0eS1vZi1mcmF1ZC9dOj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q= > The head of the federal agency created after 9/11 to protect the > nation’s transportation system is accused of fraud, waste, and > abuse of authority for unlawfully deploying assets to the Mexican > border to perform duties unrelated to transportation, according to a > report [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=28468&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2ZhbWRoc2lnY29tcGxhaW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] > filed with the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Inspector > General. In the formal complaint to the DHS watchdog, the Air > Marshal National Council, which represents thousands of Federal Air > Marshals (FAM) nationwide, accuses Transportation Security > Administration (TSA) Administrator David Pekoske and FAM Director > Tirrell Stevenson of violating federal law and overstepping their > authority for assigning the highly trained aviation security > specialists to assist the U.S. Border Patrol with the illegal > immigration crisis. FAM operates under TSA and both function under > DHS. > > “The TSA personnel are being sent to El Paso TX, San Diego CA, > Laredo TX, McAllen TX, Tucson AZ, and Yuma AZ,” the complaint > states, adding that internal agency documents reveal the “highly > skilled FAMs” are being sent to the southwest border to perform > “Hospital Watch, Transportation, Law Enforcement Searches, Welfare > Checks, and Entry Control.” The duties have no relation to TSA’s > core mission of transportation security, the filing says, and > instead the air marshals will assist migrants who have crossed the > border into the United States. TSA was created after 2001 to help > prevent another terrorist attack, though the agency is famous for > its lapses, including a big one just days ago when a man was allowed > to board a plane in Cincinnati with two box cutters. FAM is charged > with protecting commercial passenger flights by deterring and > countering the risk of terrorist activity. At the very least it > seems like a waste to send the highly trained law enforcement agents > to the border to babysit illegal immigrants. > > “The statute does not give the Administrator any authority to > deploy TSA or FAM employees to the southern border to perform non > transportation security related matters,” the complaint to the DHS > IG states. “Further, under section (g) the statute describes what > the Administrators authority is if an emergency, as defined by the > Secretary of Homeland Security, is declared.” The act makes clear > that the legislative intent is to only allow TSA to exercise > authority and deploy its assets for transportation security, the > report to the DHS watchdog confirms. “To date Mr. Pekoske nor Mr. > Stevenson have declared the deployments to be related to > transportation security,” according to the complaint. Furthermore, > the duties, “Hospital Watch, Entry Control, Law Enforcement > searches, and Transportation,” could not be interpreted to have > any nexus to the TSA core mission of transportation security. > Additionally, the document notes that Congress has not appropriated > any funds in the TSA budget for border security, making any money > expended for the cause a violation of the Antideficiency Act which > prohibits federal employees from obligating funds unless Congress > has approved the amount and purpose of the spending. > > A few weeks ago Judicial Watch obtained the DHS memorandum to the > nation’s air marshal force announcing that officers would soon be > sent to the southern border to help deal with “a surge in > irregular migration.” > [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=28373&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWlyLW1hcnNoYWxzLXNlbnQtdG8tYm9yZGVyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] The > notice states that “the unprecedented volume of Noncitizen > Migrants (NCMs) currently apprehended mandates immediate further > action to protect the life and safety of federal personnel and > noncitizens in CBP [Customs and Border Protection] custody.” It is > the first acknowledgment, albeit leaked involuntarily, by the Biden > administration that there is indeed a crisis along the nation’s > famously porous southern border. “To support its mission, CBP is > seeking federal employees from DHS Components and other federal > agencies to be placed on reimbursable TDY assignments to assist in > critical support functions,” the widely circulated mandate reads, > adding that “LE/FAMS has been directed by DHS to support this > request.” Air marshals interviewed by Judicial Watch expressed > outrage that they are being pulled from their critical inflight > security duties to assist with the mayhem created by the Biden > administration’s failed immigration policies. Until next week... [Contribute] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] [32x32x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] [32x32x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2022, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61113&L=885&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL21lbWJlcnMuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] | Unsubscribe [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/unsubscribe.php?M=27089954&C=eea98a79fb2fad93cccd0bd228df4000&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=38&N=61113&AGENCY=jw] View in browser [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?&L=1&M=27089954&N=61113&AGENCY=jw&]
clean_body: Fighting for FBI and Big Bank January 6 Records [INSIDE JW] San Francisco DA Won't Release Details of Paul Pelosi Assault [=] An attack on the spouse of the Speaker of the House is of considerable interest, but the San Francisco district attorney refused to provide documents and video [=] of the police activity at the home of Paul Pelosi, Nancy Pelosi’s husband, where David Wayne DePape was arrested following an alleged assault on October 28, 2022. Among the items District Attorney Brooke Jenkins refused to release are a recording of Paul Pelosi’s 911 call and police officers’ body camera footage. Nikki Moore, assistant district attorney, took the unusual step of providing some details about the incident response to our California Public Records Act request: The two persons present at the Pelosi home when the SFPD arrived where [sic] Mr. Pelosi and Mr. DePape. Please see the online posted document that reflects that Mr. Pelosi was the only person in the home at the time of the attack. See =. You can obtain an official copy of this court record from the Superior Court. In our November 2022 request to the district attorney, we noted a news report stating that news organizations had been rebuffed on similar requests and, pursuant to the California Public Records Act, we asked for, in addition to the recording and camera footage: All records of communications, including emails and text messages, between the District Attorney’s Office and the San Francisco Police Department concerning the incident. We also asked for communications with several federal agencies, including the Justice Department, the Capitol Police, and the FBI. And we asked for the identities of the persons at the Pelosi home at the time of the incident. In declining the information we requested, Assistant DA Moore cited Section 6254 of California law, which governs records requests, and specifically subsection (f), which allows for the withholding from the public of certain “records of investigations conducted by the Office of the Attorney General and the Department of Justice, the Office of Emergency Services and any state or local police agency ...” There is significant public interest in the terrible attack on Paul Pelosi and it is odd that the local authorities are withholding basic information about the incident. In our previous work, in September, we received [=] records from the California Highway Patrol Public Records Unit that included 44 photos and five hours of audio/video footage depicting the misconduct and arrest of Paul Pelosi. The material shows that Mr. Pelosi invoked his wife’s name and shared his police charity membership during the arrest for suspected alcohol intoxication while driving. JUDICIAL WATCH APPEAL SEEKS FBI JANUARY 6 COMMUNICATIONS WITH BANKS We are pushing back on the attempt to curtail our investigation into the full details about the January 6 disturbance. We want the details about what looks to be an unprecedented abuse of the financial privacy of countless innocent Americans by big banks and the FBI. We filed an appeal challenging a U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia decision allowing the FBI to withhold records of communication between the FBI and several financial institutions about the reported transfer of financial transaction records of people in DC, Maryland and Virginia on January 5 and January 6, 2021 (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 22-5209). The FBI’s cover-up should be rejected, and the records made public. Our appeal, filed in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia, comes in the FOIA lawsuit [=] we filed after the FBI failed to respond to a February 10, 2021, FOIA request (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [== (No. 1:21-cv-01216)). We are asking for: All records of communication between the FBI and any financial institution, including but not limited to Bank of America, Citibank, Chase Manhattan Bank, Discover, and/or American Express, in which the FBI sought transaction data for those financial institutions’ debit and credit card account holders who made purchases in Washington, DC, Maryland and/or Virginia on January 5, 2021, and/or January 6, 2021. In our appellate brief, we argue: This appeal arises from what appears to be an unprecedented abuse of the financial privacy of thousands of Americans. Substantial and compelling evidence demonstrates that the FBI sought and received records from financial institutions of anyone who used a credit card or engaged in other transactions in the Washington, D.C. area on January 5 or 6, 2021. This would include many thousands of persons living in the Washington, DC area, including possibly members of this Court. In our appeal we point out that the lower court was mistaken when it upheld [] the FBI’s Glomar response (neither confirming nor denying the existence of records) because the FBI previously acknowledged the existence of the records in multiple ways. For instance, court records filed in support of a criminal case include the FBI’s statement of facts that provides the defendant’s address, which was obtained through “his Bank of America account and recent Expedia transactions.” In another case, the FBI “confirmed that it obtained records from PNC Bank and discusses in detail the multiple ways that it used the financial data.” Additionally, “financial records obtained from JP Morgan Chase bank corroborate [the defendant] used a credit card issued in his name to purchase gas and food enroute to Washington, DC ...” We cite two additional cases where the FBI describes in publicly available court records its use of financial records in the January 6 investigation. We conclude: [Judicial Watch] more than adequately demonstrated that the FBI may have sought and received records from financial institutions of anyone who used a credit card or engaged in other transactions in the Washington, DC area on January 5 or 6. If so, this would be an unprecedented abuse of the financial privacy of thousands of Americans. [Judicial Watch’s] FOIA request to investigate this should not be blocked by a meritless Glomar response. We are engaged in a comprehensive, independent investigation into the January 6 disturbance. In February 2022, we filed an opposition [] to the U.S. Capitol Police’s (USCP) effort to shut down Judicial Watch’s federal lawsuit for January 6 videos and emails. Through its police department, Congress argues [==] that the videos and emails are not public records, there is no public interest in their release, and that “sovereign immunity” prevents citizens from suing for their release. And we recently sued [=] the U.S. Department of Defense and U.S. Department of Justice for records related to the housing of U.S. Capitol Police Lieutenant Michael Byrd at Joint Base Andrews after he shot and killed U.S. Air Force veteran Ashli Babbitt inside the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021. TSA DIRECTOR ACCUSED OF UNLAWFULLY DEPLOYING ASSETS TO MEXICAN BORDER The Biden administration’s open border policy is creating internal government confusion. The Air Marshal National Council accuses Transportation Security Administration (TSA) of violating federal law and overstepping their authority for assigning air marshals to assist with the illegal immigration crisis. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [= The head of the federal agency created after 9/11 to protect the nation’s transportation system is accused of fraud, waste, and abuse of authority for unlawfully deploying assets to the Mexican border to perform duties unrelated to transportation, according to a report [=] filed with the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Inspector General. In the formal complaint to the DHS watchdog, the Air Marshal National Council, which represents thousands of Federal Air Marshals (FAM) nationwide, accuses Transportation Security Administration (TSA) Administrator David Pekoske and FAM Director Tirrell Stevenson of violating federal law and overstepping their authority for assigning the highly trained aviation security specialists to assist the U.S. Border Patrol with the illegal immigration crisis. FAM operates under TSA and both function under DHS. “The TSA personnel are being sent to El Paso TX, San Diego CA, Laredo TX, McAllen TX, Tucson AZ, and Yuma AZ,” the complaint states, adding that internal agency documents reveal the “highly skilled FAMs” are being sent to the southwest border to perform “Hospital Watch, Transportation, Law Enforcement Searches, Welfare Checks, and Entry Control.” The duties have no relation to TSA’s core mission of transportation security, the filing says, and instead the air marshals will assist migrants who have crossed the border into the United States. TSA was created after 2001 to help prevent another terrorist attack, though the agency is famous for its lapses, including a big one just days ago when a man was allowed to board a plane in Cincinnati with two box cutters. FAM is charged with protecting commercial passenger flights by deterring and countering the risk of terrorist activity. At the very least it seems like a waste to send the highly trained law enforcement agents to the border to babysit illegal immigrants. “The statute does not give the Administrator any authority to deploy TSA or FAM employees to the southern border to perform non transportation security related matters,” the complaint to the DHS IG states. “Further, under section (g) the statute describes what the Administrators authority is if an emergency, as defined by the Secretary of Homeland Security, is declared.” The act makes clear that the legislative intent is to only allow TSA to exercise authority and deploy its assets for transportation security, the report to the DHS watchdog confirms. “To date Mr. Pekoske nor Mr. Stevenson have declared the deployments to be related to transportation security,” according to the complaint. Furthermore, the duties, “Hospital Watch, Entry Control, Law Enforcement searches, and Transportation,” could not be interpreted to have any nexus to the TSA core mission of transportation security. Additionally, the document notes that Congress has not appropriated any funds in the TSA budget for border security, making any money expended for the cause a violation of the Antideficiency Act which prohibits federal employees from obligating funds unless Congress has approved the amount and purpose of the spending. A few weeks ago Judicial Watch obtained the DHS memorandum to the nation’s air marshal force announcing that officers would soon be sent to the southern border to help deal with “a surge in irregular migration.” [=] The notice states that “the unprecedented volume of Noncitizen Migrants (NCMs) currently apprehended mandates immediate further action to protect the life and safety of federal personnel and noncitizens in CBP [Customs and Border Protection] custody.” It is the first acknowledgment, albeit leaked involuntarily, by the Biden administration that there is indeed a crisis along the nation’s famously porous southern border. “To support its mission, CBP is seeking federal employees from DHS Components and other federal agencies to be placed on reimbursable TDY assignments to assist in critical support functions,” the widely circulated mandate reads, adding that “LE/FAMS has been directed by DHS to support this request.” Air marshals interviewed by Judicial Watch expressed outrage that they are being pulled from their critical inflight security duties to assist with the mayhem created by the Biden administration’s failed immigration policies. Until next week... body:
|

Team -- the intentions of the far-right were pretty clear. They attempted to endanger our democracy with anti-democratic tactics such as implementing voter suppression laws and challenging votes from people across the country.
**[Rush a donation to help All On The Line’s work in protecting fair democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54814400/379761221/-1411470677?refcode=20221118_AOTL_F_cohighlight_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyM2Y3NWRiLTFhNjgtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=epoqGf3J4rl1gM7hB_e3Be_4-cMPtAIvBofSFlXGLok=)**

---
* * *
Luckily, we remained steadfast in our advocacy and volunteer work to ensure we held these election deniers accountable for their extremist ideals and actions that undermines the voice of the people. We showed up on Election Day and proved fair democracy wins!

In states like Michigan, Wisconsin and Arizona, voters chose governors who believe in democracy. **Democracy held and those election deniers lost.**

Election deniers wanted power to impose their view of America on us. **Together, we took a stand. With your support, we took a stand by doing three things:**
* We led a movement for fair maps and elections by bringing together volunteers, elected officials and partner organizations across the country.
* We advocated for voting rights legislation and against voter suppression bills ahead of the election.
* In the months leading up to the election, we mobilized our volunteers to support election administration by becoming poll workers.

Team -- our differences are what makes this country. Democracy held because different thoughts, different ideas, different people came together believing in progress toward fairness and justice.

**[All On The Line democracy reform work drives people together in the fight for fair democracy. There is still work to be done. Emuni Sanderson

clean_body: | Team -- the intentions of the far-right were pretty clear. They attempted to endanger our democracy with anti-democratic tactics such as implementing voter suppression laws and challenging votes from people across the country. = = Luckily, we remained steadfast in our advocacy and volunteer work to ensure we held these election deniers accountable for their extremist ideals and actions that undermines the voice of the people. We showed up on Election Day and proved fair democracy wins! In states like Michigan, Wisconsin and Arizona, voters chose governors who believe in democracy. Democracy held and those election deniers lost. Election deniers wanted power to impose their view of America on us. Together, we took a stand. With your support, we took a stand by doing three things: We led a movement for fair maps and elections by bringing together volunteers, elected officials and partner organizations across the country. We advocated for voting rights legislation and against voter suppression bills ahead of the election. In the months leading up to the election, we mobilized our volunteers to support election administration by becoming poll workers. Team -- our differences are what makes this country. Democracy held because different thoughts, different ideas, different people came together believing in progress toward fairness and justice. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you for believing in the work we do at All On The Line and not letting anti-democratic extremists eradicate the power of diversity. **Peter, as we enter the brutal winter months, New York City's persistent housing crisis remains unresolved.**

Over the last couple of years, New Yorkers have accrued millions of dollars in back rent owed, and the brunt of this debt is shouldered by financially vulnerable households and communities. In fact, renting a typical unit "would require a household income of at least $110,000 a year" –**more than double that of the average New York City renter.**
This is incredibly tragic. Renters who have already fallen behind are at risk of accruing even more debt and potentially ending up homeless. **Every person should have a right to housing that is both safe and affordable** – but decades of discriminatory housing practices, the manipulative actions of private investors, and a multiyear battle with COVID-19 have taken this right away from millions of New Yorkers.

That’s why, as the People’s Lawyer, I’m fighting to secure fair access to affordable housing for all. I will not rest until every New Yorker has a safe, clean place to put their head at night – but I cannot win this fight alone. **I need to collect at least 2,500 responses before this survey closes at midnight tonight, and I still don’t know where you stand, Peter. Please, let me know:**
| | **Should everyone have access to affordable housing?**
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Fill your home with joy this Christmas
body:
I have exciting news to share and I wanted you to be among the first to know.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zosipemq4can8ipf5prjuf5se1smbaru2214vm68_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jm0o34c5h2bs)
---
| Friend, I have exciting news to share and I wanted you to be among the first to know.

Over the years, I have heard from so many viewers and listeners of _Pathway to Victory_ about our wonderful First Baptist Dallas choir and orchestra worship music. And the question we always hear is, "Can I get a copy of that performance to listen to and share with my family?"

Now, this holiday season, I can finally answer, "Yes!"

For the first time, _Pathway to Victory_ has a Christmas music CD available featuring the best performances from the First Baptist Dallas Choir & Orchestra. Let me send you a copy as my thanks for your support of the broadcast ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

This uplifting music CD, called [**_Celebrate The Savior_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbfd6t8mr2aogi8c0fheoulhjs515ues9cgarg08_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jm0o34c5h2bs), includes nine songs with arrangements and performances that will please any family member or friend this Christmas season. Songs include:
| | Joy To The World
Star of Wonder
A Christmas Medley of Joy To The World, O Come Let Us Adore Him, Angels We Have Heard On High
Oh Holy Night
Go Tell It On The Mountain
The Glory Of Christmas
I Wonder As I Wander
Christ Is Born

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaopq0jdc2rn5ptsjrikf4o93o51vfhdt45eapko_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jm0o34c5h2bs)
---
| Don't wait--**[request your copy today](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4ivpikv8kceeg1r8euep6sdghoqq5o3rcedql18_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jm0o34c5h2bs)** with our thanks for a generous ministry gift to support _Pathway to Victory_ so we can ship it to you in time for Thanksgiving gatherings and for you to play as you decorate for Christmas.

I pray that this music will be a blessing to you and your family this holiday season,

Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Liz G., Team Andy Kim
subject: When we all come together, incredible things happen.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Democracy is about more than one person running for office. It's more than a campaign slogan.

It's about creating a movement of people and coming together for the common good.

That's exactly what we saw on election night. Democracy.

When we set out to win this race, we knew we needed to create the biggest grassroots movement New Jersey had ever seen. And we did.

It all started with a great message. It's easy to have a great message when you have a great candidate like Andy. As the old saying goes, actions speak louder than words. And Andy's actions speak for themselves. He always puts people before politics.

Then, we needed to spread Andy's message far and wide. And we did just that. Thanks to people like you, our movement grew faster than any of us imagined.

By Election Day, we...

→ Had 2,259 volunteers attend an event with the campaign

→ Made over 100,000 calls

→ Knocked on over 65,000 doors

→ Sent a quarter of a million text messages

→ Had over 54,000 donations

And ultimately, Andy received over 145,000 votes, making him the first three-term Democrat NJ-03 has elected in more than 50 years.

This is democracy.

A movement of people coming together for the common good. Everyone played an important part, from donors to volunteers to voters.

Because when we all come together, incredible things happen.

I'm so grateful to be part of this historic movement with you.
Liz G. Campaign Manager Express Donate:

name: House Conservative Leadership (GOP AUDIT ENCLOSED) -- via Team Scalise
subject: We have our top priorities -- but what are yours?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Be the first Republican to respond to our 2023 GOP Audit >>>
**We SAVED our America First movement, SAVED our Conservative Supreme Court Majority, SAVED energy independence, AND SAVED our Pro-Life movement!**
Now House Republican Leadership is scheduling their very first meetings for the upcoming Congress and we need to get some basic information from our greatest supporters like you.
**[COMPLETE YOUR 2023 GOP AUDIT NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911231:6zWANmGNN:m:1:3371220873:A7A90DFC6C1E96B3BEA50FAC8BD1875F:r)**
This is your very FIRST CHANCE to have a direct line of communication with Republican Leadership AND chart the course for the objectives of our Congress this upcoming year. The economy, crime, and defending personal liberty are our top priorities. [**But what are yours, Peter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911231:6zWANmGNN:m:1:3371220873:A7A90DFC6C1E96B3BEA50FAC8BD1875F:r)
Let us know by 11:59 PM tonight to be the very FIRST Republican from your area to influence our party's agenda this upcoming year.
We can't thank you enough for your input,
House Conservatives
Sent via Team Scalise
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Personally asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911194:JzK2NmGNh:m:1:3361486117:A9F7CEC2F6D823019FA4012200C31851:r)**

[** Chip in before Midnight -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911194:JzK2NmGNh:m:1:3361486117:A9F7CEC2F6D823019FA4012200C31851:r)
We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would send in just $25, we'd easily hit our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911194:JzK2NmGNh:m:1:3361486117:A9F7CEC2F6D823019FA4012200C31851:r)**

**[So Peter, I'm personally asking you today to chip in $25 or even $34 to my campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so that we win this critical runoff!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911194:JzK2NmGNh:m:1:3361486117:A9F7CEC2F6D823019FA4012200C31851:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911194:JzK2NmGNh:m:1:3361486117:A9F7CEC2F6D823019FA4012200C31851:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911194:JzK2NmGNh:m:1:3361486117:A9F7CEC2F6D823019FA4012200C31851:r)

| Fellow activist,

clean_body: If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today. Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05afb1936ef34c8490d8c8d7f7852b05&_e=1YnGtQtUWKAifv4DXB_0roBwnZ-HrTSRJdn0kg2ZOu9XFtQPjFcnMQdR9eFeWKDUxWTo84Ykkdjc1DmhbZVxlfD56nlOA4QSuzDm-eOR7Pz6MdHIadAsUWXCjm8lKe5CXRn41_Xn34UPoSQzGHFMY11c2MJo0lfQ5guAcoirq8y5KKuH6aZKi6oC_IAbBJlU2ydN64QfXtF2F9pn6NgwArPeUShTh6OOlUeuS2ax3DIupdoSkrcAjW7EuBLa1fzb8Y5EyncrErwP8dqBuYl8o88tGTYpfzNYMUJgU1e5id_zvzNO21H6Uw1t9E9u0B3Xvk_XkpYRoIoobht3GbkPAWIT1ByQju_TYn79_p6vKZoBy65yzhjMeAudzX7bgeDYVP262TupbsmewgHuWQqpFqcpT8KufPEDwjbYSI6t2Go%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=05afb1936ef34c8490d8c8d7f7852b05&_e=1YnGtQtUWKAifv4DXB_0roBwnZ-HrTSRJdn0kg2ZOu9XFtQPjFcnMQdR9eFeWKDUxWTo84Ykkdjc1DmhbZVxlfD56nlOA4QSuzDm-eOR7Pz6MdHIadAsUWXCjm8lKe5CXRn41_Xn34UPoSQzGHFMY11c2MJo0lfQ5guAcoirq8y5KKuH6aZKi6oC_IAbBJlU2ydN64QfXtF2F9pn6NgwAkaXxnAltu69oAYkYlldwJoNlbk--tzM7Wuqj_UxO-xKY4QkWO9FOh2QHlgr7yutRA8e740uB_d8wEgs7ONvg5ezm30HcvnqFPrQkFEf37FWUFAXQv1rQsU_8JkMwJd3sFpeVRUdpcIKvbXBheBSsuwFS-2wQurIvMKGFHuUOdaYnJx1bxe-X7kmaXrk6kgxdJdNCeK60MoSReT-lHpnCO8%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zaleqnlb1er8e851mhedgmbkfe9fp16hgbvi2vq8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmcor2cth2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z745f50ejd3ictr0s094aqovlqcmdhsidk9mjcso_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmcor2cth2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znfu8mf2vmspolqjkp939opn479dhiltbf1ijq5g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmcor2cth2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1vc0o1qd5v72uirmlffec1masatih6ppn8e26go_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmcor2cth2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu0ic77b1vv5vc09c1g3ptvl4pjrseau3e03ll5o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmcor2cth2bs)

---

Friend,

I was riding in the car earlier today, and BANG!

Reality set in, and I came to a huge realization.

Once the Left gets their ducks in a row, they will be back to their old tricks. The red wave didn’t pan out how we expected it, and the left will go into overtime to advance their radical agenda. **[I’ll keep fighting until I’m out of breath, and we’re not out of this fight yet.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp5rdmogflgpdbffrnih09u3b14nk1f9jffn1lr8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmcor2cth2bs)**

---

I KNOW we did our best here in Louisiana. We had a **MASSIVE** victory, but unfortunately, we still have a lot of work to do to turn our country around. We don’t have time to sit around and cry over spilt milk. We need to get back on our feet and start fighting like the future of the country depends on it. Because it does.

**[Much like how a radical woker can’t live without a $20 soy milk latte, I can’t live without your support.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr9o40so87ip6ldl0gv78mvfng6ar5nv3gqheuqg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmcor2cth2bs)**

The days ahead will be long and arduous. I’m sure there will be many things said in Washington over the next few months that will make me wish I could bash my head against the wall. **[However, I’m 100% confident it will be worth it, we’re in this together, and we’re not going to stop fighting, EVER.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z25qfghpk5jvb5i32bospveib42ku0o4mi15frpo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmcor2cth2bs)**

name: VP Mike Pence
subject: I’ve got some BIG news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
Mike Pence here, did you hear the news? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0155%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=HuiebsxsBM%2f7dpnVX6uIhw&sysid=1)

| |
---
| | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40295%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p5ylyHVUOatfUAEa9txu9g&sysid=1)
---

Mike Pence here, did you hear the news?

_**[I have prayed over this day for a long time. I am sharing my story with the American people-the good, the bad, the blessings included. I have a special copy reserved for you. Want to hear more?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40296%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rw0bEJ%2fXcuV9EFgln9fBcw&sysid=1 "I have prayed over this day for
a long time. I am sharing my story with the American people–the good, the
bad, the blessings included. I have a special copy reserved for you. Want to hear
more?")**_
**⬇️⬇️⬇️**

---
This is the inside story of the Trump administration from its second highest official--what I said to the president and how I was tested.

I share exclusively how the faith that I embraced as a young man guided each and every decision I made at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.

**I’m giving you a look into every second of my experiences in public service, from the early lessons to the major accomplishments.**

I will forever remain grateful for the grace of God, the love and support of my family, and the blessings of liberty that are every American’s birthright.
---

If you chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, I’ll send you a signed copy.

I can’t wait to share this journey with you.

For Faith & Freedom,
Vice President Mike Pence

---
|
---
| Paid for by Advancing American Freedom

Washington, DC 20004

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z46akl258oprvu3qif6akth9bpfm3m085tlhubno_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmeoj4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn8jp8scqt8qns17kvf6v7fk7a33omjvt92k7vf8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmeoj4cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmqcid3232e2ljrt8h7bojohf8loeqump2smoko8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmeoj4cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

House Conservatives

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911211:JtwFsmGqN:m:1:3369487795:C399495FA7B73A49B93FA55E99484EB3:r)**

We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would send in just $25, we'd easily hit our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911211:JtwFsmGqN:m:1:3369487795:C399495FA7B73A49B93FA55E99484EB3:r)**

**[So Peter, I'm personally asking you today to chip in $25 or even $34 to my campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so that we win this critical runoff!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911211:JtwFsmGqN:m:1:3369487795:C399495FA7B73A49B93FA55E99484EB3:r)**

Thank you,

Herschel Walker

name: Herschel Walker HQ
subject: First ad of the runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916247:6m6zsmGtN:m:1:3374012347:9830A5904E4F46B5F1976E7293CA20D2:r)

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916247:6m6zsmGtN:m:1:3374012347:9830A5904E4F46B5F1976E7293CA20D2:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916247:6m6zsmGtN:m:1:3374012347:9830A5904E4F46B5F1976E7293CA20D2:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916247:6m6zsmGtN:m:1:3374012347:9830A5904E4F46B5F1976E7293CA20D2:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916247:6m6zsmGtN:m:1:3374012347:9830A5904E4F46B5F1976E7293CA20D2:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916247:6m6zsmGtN:m:1:3374012347:9830A5904E4F46B5F1976E7293CA20D2:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916247:6m6zsmGtN:m:1:3374012347:9830A5904E4F46B5F1976E7293CA20D2:r)

clean_body: | Peter, Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel. We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election. He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad. But we have good news, for now... Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be. We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help? Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink. Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. Thanks, P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: ICYMI News
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr153qd40nbq06lebqkkr67rasmv99ae1skou0h0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmeoj4cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sdnm2q64p9gsaq7cclic2pb8stmm9omccljcph68d726er64pbkedrj8dtjchg6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32dpl6hg74tr66jib6p77m2qmash5u)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc5bipgccp7g07af013q11crog3td94ms2uqeee8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmeoj4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlsuboj49t4g9as7offi3gks2ovkqnvuj6g2kp8o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmeoj4cjh2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjs1sa5vv0g2dvlp717t0itqaj2l12u9lhms66h8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmeoj4cjh2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdl6u2fl179nmcvh4k93vud5dt98i6jfgd3f4njg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jmeoj4cjh2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

subject: Before we send this to Dan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi — Did you see this? We’re sending Dan this virtual card to congratulate him on last week’s victory and we want you to add your name.

Before we send this to him tonight, **[click here to sign the card and congratulate Dan→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54827664/379793087/-932226391?source=EM_NBI_DK_20221119_PT_1.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_congratscard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWE0MjZiMi0yZDY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZLMBxivISJkrMb8dtiY6z-NZfGA1bQ2zFr2qNxAwFE=&emci=4fa74c9f-5c67-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=c9a426b2-2d68-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=31479900)**

Kildee HQ

* * *
**_Forwarded Message:_**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54827665/379793088/-932226391?source=EM_NBI_DK_20221119_PT_1.2_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_congratscard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWE0MjZiMi0yZDY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZLMBxivISJkrMb8dtiY6z-NZfGA1bQ2zFr2qNxAwFE=&emci=4fa74c9f-5c67-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=c9a426b2-2d68-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=31479900)
Hi there,

Dan won!

With your help, we WON one of the most competitive House districts in the entire country!

While almost $20 million was spent in this race, the majority of which being outside dark money and a self-funding opponent, our campaign was ALWAYS powered by grassroots supporters like you.

We couldn’t have won this race without you.

body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4e7d0472bb84dd7b5d44e0083b996ff&_e=_o8MGdmUcduU8i0EudX66oxUIyYWZRKq7iKx94pIinY7LElYkxyQk53mNq3qMbsojjC4qsv33kkSb_oM-yYlK8QqZFcaYPHGVQnkBfZSjFpLH3fj8ulluzK3Up3mBfHykS3L3GypBnzgvlIDF5XVYtHWw9PcK0QKgFcCaJd_p7W8W2NKF71-DIbpIuNyp1yLiv51X4brOXV4EsVdU0zgY9IfueMGq4gaPodNbPIOOLnY9mtwToM1PBm2924qqWQuyfan05C3gWCjQA7eoowAXHHBBh6lU1HDO5WFJ2s5ffSLkghABafr3ggSvEiN20g-HA54JsgBLjzzRITlOWuTpJ6zGPx7kb7QlqOjRLk_wvpEYAf0fjqQKzLtO5ArQf_KOqB98AVqxPtkzG3OY5e0rQ%3D%3D)

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled ["](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4e7d0472bb84dd7b5d44e0083b996ff&_e=_o8MGdmUcduU8i0EudX66oxUIyYWZRKq7iKx94pIinY7LElYkxyQk53mNq3qMbsojjC4qsv33kkSb_oM-yYlK8QqZFcaYPHGVQnkBfZSjFpLH3fj8ulluzK3Up3mBfHykS3L3GypBnzgvlIDF5XVYtHWw9PcK0QKgFcCaJd_p7W8W2NKF71-DIbpIuNyp1yLiv51X4brOXV4EsVdU0zgY9IfueMGq4gaPodNbPIOOLnY9mtwToM1PBm2924qqWQuOJ83vhbW1to-bwaJyytYwiM6OjMkwHWYmb16SP7LzniEuxEexpekZew4UFNf6UeflQNo820wwByYs510KPVRQyKGvH65aGSJwqNlsJ-r95pBRTUZ96Jlu-B-ctO6zWTShrlaJRdOS32nPdrHBexyhA%3D%3D)**[The Second World Wars."](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4e7d0472bb84dd7b5d44e0083b996ff&_e=_o8MGdmUcduU8i0EudX66oxUIyYWZRKq7iKx94pIinY7LElYkxyQk53mNq3qMbsojjC4qsv33kkSb_oM-yYlK8QqZFcaYPHGVQnkBfZSjFpLH3fj8ulluzK3Up3mBfHykS3L3GypBnzgvlIDF5XVYtHWw9PcK0QKgFcCaJd_p7W8W2NKF71-DIbpIuNyp1yLiv51X4brOXV4EsVdU0zgY9IfueMGq4gaPodNbPIOOLnY9mtwToM1PBm2924qqWQugS-KnKjN-MaiwVIWmYtPsUiz6B20BHhpjinKl6dyMMLaTu37UZ_-Faj6xVlYqeB8FXcPwx5Joo6PAcDw6ahSEnGUaG7Uw5nJ2P8h74dSsODAC0qabMGfGlTfhmr_eYVX7CC9idJDYtyNUtezbHPbGQ%3D%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies' victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

clean_body: We WILL Save America Friend, Donald J. Trump is OFFICIALLY running in 2024 to be the next President of the United States. My father puts America First and will never quit - because the fate of our Country is at stake. Our cruel and vindictive political class is not just coming after him--they are coming after YOU and everything YOU stand for. They have already taken away your voice, and now they want to take away your freedom. With you by my father 's side, not only will we SAVE AMERICA, but we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. Your generous contributions in the past have been the backbone of our mission and fight against the tyrannical Left. Today, my father is counting on you to help ensure we have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message that together,WE WILL SAVE AMERICA. I will send my father a list to his Mar-a-Lago office with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder. I know he's counting on you, Friend. Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | | | Hi there Peter. Have you seen this exciting news?

_**Dr. Ben Carson just released his new book Created Equal and I 've got a signed copy with your name on it!**_ _**[CLAIM YOUR COPY HERE>>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61912382:6tBN8mGN2:m:1:3331703221:3A72AD375756506AC22AF86DC7F78BAC:r "CLAIM YOUR COPY HERE >>>>")**_
