---
In his book, Ben Carson tackles the issue of race in America and uses his experiences growing up in the toughest parts of Detroit to help us chart a better course.

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

This debate is so critical to America's future, and that is why every Conservative should read his new book.

_**[Claim your signed copy of Ben Carson's new book Created Equal HERE >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61912382:6tBN8mGN2:m:1:3331703221:3A72AD375756506AC22AF86DC7F78BAC:r "Claim your signed copy of Ben Carson’s new book Created Equal HERE >>>")**_

Elisa

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re not done yet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next three weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again.
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next three weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on election day, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next three weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9ib167tv0scfmjk7v8elo2rrqol2aqp8h3sqs80_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jm9o30c3h2bs)**

[** RUSH $10 -> **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj2tascb1ec1kar0r1gkvdncfl499o1ig0mtou28_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jm9o30c3h2bs)
[** RUSH $34 -> **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znrursq3ghsjmhc85bpmmt08qkvncabd535g6k1g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jm9o30c3h2bs)
Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlv6o9cu2jpt3nou6bbm077v4ouuvhfsvn0fnofg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3jm9o30c3h2bs)**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next three weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. | _**RUNOFF ELECTION TRIGGERED**_
**Election Day: Dec 6th**

**Herschel Walker needs your support to win the final race of 2022!**
---

I know I've asked a lot from you, Friend. But the 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat simply isn't an option.

We wanted to win this race outright. But we battled back from a double-digit deficit this summer and forced a runoff in Georgia. That's all thanks to you.
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE TO THE RUNOFF ACTION FUND](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8faecb0b82a4fc5949e3f5cf8ba0bd9&_e=u_J5rgra37_D-wh6RlfeedfnBuCn8Pn9OO0vvXH_giqxjFJ8Te_0A5EbuVRn9TXAhZS1GaQtefHumGJvaPK7PWXdIbcE6FunHpoyCLlHQ3Zh4R22_RjZz6KWxZoOSReD-L4L1dQLlsssNL45St0qZiaTlgcfqBMJl4i0SawqUKbuDrjpVHrarm1hcjBU4qULXXeOv3B6JuMXuf-wVwvlFZHaOVz7QrIGkjx_OThExZXKN3JXRb0gHtWgngx9vXGgOcrGrD12H0uSyQNi2dUzkyaEBY3ZYk57Tp9W8GG1fOyYNJ-ybjh_xCk0PwPKLlDb8HSH0e8RIS4XiyPT0bktKLcw-7fmVBkbx1vVlKuKwjpqbZ-LyYLJbzr5AVk7T-zbE7YdM5PpGOq_vyObyZOnKhnqYDdSMIncZBiCxQ8guKGYCXdb52Umvfr-U_sRvAW0tUyG1B57TxdzAn9tUmJnFJeHnp-cruiBQF6w15gnAIoVbHtPFqRRJ2ZSz8kk3ZguMifuvp5mWJD1fq10RKTZHk7D6sqxxqILq-kq25M3nmdE5V4IRHnVkoXZEFvlDTqLzSbCC6VkVQ2x-DrCsweaDw%3D%3D)
---
This has been a long and grueling campaign. I can't thank you enough for sticking it out to the end. But I'm asking you to dig deep one last time and help Herschel Walker stay in this fight.

I know I've asked a lot from you, Friend. But the 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat simply isn't an option. We wanted to win this race outright. But we battled back from a double-digit deficit this summer and forced a runoff in Georgia. That's all thanks to you. | | | This has been a long and grueling campaign. I can't thank you enough for sticking it out to the end. But I'm asking you to dig deep one last time and help Herschel Walker stay in this fight. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Christian Persecution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61915790:JOnX8mGNx:m:1:3331421248:FBC3CC0018DAB3156C50BC3FCDB7BCD0:r)
---

The pages of George Orwell's 1984 are coming to life.

Christian pastors are currently being unlawfully arrested, beaten, and detained abroad.

In places like Nigeria, we've even seen scores of innocent Christians killed for simply living out their faith.

And, Christians aren't being persecuted only in foreign countries - it's also happening right here at home.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61915790:JOnX8mGNx:m:1:3331421248:FBC3CC0018DAB3156C50BC3FCDB7BCD0:r)
---

In recent years, we've seen our own government close churches and prevent believers from meeting in their places of worship.

We've even seen a high school football coach, Joe Kennedy, fired for the simple act of praying alone on a field.

**We cannot abide by the persecution of the faithful - not here,_not anywhere._**

---
| | [DEFEND RELIGIOUS FREEDOM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61915790:JOnX8mGNx:m:1:3331421248:FBC3CC0018DAB3156C50BC3FCDB7BCD0:r)
---

That's why I'm working overtime to defend religious freedom and prevent the persecution of true believers abroad and at home.

If you feel inclined to help me in this endeavor, _**[please consider making a contribution today to help us elect more leaders at every level of government who will protect religious freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61915790:JOnX8mGNx:m:1:3331421248:FBC3CC0018DAB3156C50BC3FCDB7BCD0:r "please consider making a contribution today to help us elect more leaders at every level of
government who will protect religious freedom.")**_

Together, I know we can stop these gross injustices and defend the faithful.

God Bless,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61915790:JOnX8mGNx:m:1:3331421248:FBC3CC0018DAB3156C50BC3FCDB7BCD0:r)

Mike Pompeo

subject: We have our top priorities -- but what are yours?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Be the first Republican to respond to our 2023 GOP Audit >>>
**We SAVED our America First movement, SAVED our Conservative Supreme Court Majority, SAVED energy independence, AND SAVED our Pro-Life movement!**
Now House Republican Leadership is scheduling their very first meetings for the upcoming Congress and we need to get some basic information from our greatest supporters like you.
**[COMPLETE YOUR 2023 GOP AUDIT NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911233:6uy58mGNc:m:1:3369487795:C503EBA289E980C18090E122F7092297:r)**
This is your very FIRST CHANCE to have a direct line of communication with Republican Leadership AND chart the course for the objectives of our Congress this upcoming year. The economy, crime, and defending personal liberty are our top priorities. [**But what are yours, Peter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911233:6uy58mGNc:m:1:3369487795:C503EBA289E980C18090E122F7092297:r)
Let us know by 11:59 PM tonight to be the very FIRST Republican from your area to influence our party's agenda this upcoming year.
We can't thank you enough for your input,
House Conservatives
Sent via Team Scalise

body:

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916300:Jj9jkmG5N:m:1:3373497171:576FA25614EDC32F4A24E1F117FEA161:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916300:Jj9jkmG5N:m:1:3373497171:576FA25614EDC32F4A24E1F117FEA161:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916300:Jj9jkmG5N:m:1:3373497171:576FA25614EDC32F4A24E1F117FEA161:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916300:Jj9jkmG5N:m:1:3373497171:576FA25614EDC32F4A24E1F117FEA161:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916300:Jj9jkmG5N:m:1:3373497171:576FA25614EDC32F4A24E1F117FEA161:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916300:Jj9jkmG5N:m:1:3373497171:576FA25614EDC32F4A24E1F117FEA161:r)

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhrvqsnk4bjicossq618hlp5a8pr1nhlcah12v30_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrtogj5bkv1fkq7058kh46cdd723askgq2eamdqo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztmfgn4f2ha9k3j8qd76gm1ucd0d7ki28ret2ml0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z38e999qs0818b1282047ts6rfos7gmttbnnqjtg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zse5ko6l1uem5l3u7pkf2t5iareve47gf6j8h2ig_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znnhq7p1a6h3g0pig5jkr478vktj0l8os6m5jmb8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zua6p8dd0pm1ojm25cquceu1qgah45eki8oa1g30_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z16igl4q6une4k329nrp56kh1iqdosqb2bi82v88_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1kk2q9qb3lhhkj42vbn6njg490knn96na3efqt8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8nkdgcsplquj6fp9855rcg4g7folsi68t7rpleg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj6ssv2uc80a6hh5e0gd71can234aiiabdkkclvo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z202gr0d637spjtsgebapctadjotcq9r7c2ha43o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7mg0akv0vp01im5r7vu5pie7bvjtt8pq83mqb28_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpudageklh5ktir52fml5l9cal10u51dba5pi68g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc54co704jils3sq6ib2r2golbh9ou7qldd30he8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z51f8a66ndm5ikkqu8rdc8ciic0f3aj5n7eoriao_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdfnnck9ejg0efkqr7e4l5kd1ns7cioeo988p100_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfpo81cvgd207q2gkb0vc50jl1liaajucc8ij6ag_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge0o70c3h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zpka8bd9c5l5slfne8snsg4g9p2cb9js5dklvbpo).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjnm9smvp0paciri33avdg56sg3n1d1meb4prvpo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3c3ge1o30s1ge49fg)

For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter, , It was a historic midterm election for President Joe Biden and Democrats–but our work isn’t done quite yet. Georgia’s Senate seat is still up for grabs as Raphael Warnock and Herschel Walker face off in a December runoff. And even though we’ve already won the Senate, the stakes remain very high. 51 seats in the Senate versus 50 is actually a big difference. (While a 50-50 Senate allows Vice President Harris to break ties in Democrats’ favor, it’s not actually full control of the Senate.) Winning the 51st seat will allow Democrats to run the Senate without a negotiated power sharing agreement with Mitch McConnell, which has slowed down legislation and nominations. It will give Democrats outright majorities instead of 50-50 splits on each committee, and it will also give Democrats full subpoena power. Even more, winning another seat for a *real* Democrat will vastly reduce the individual power of obstructionists Sinema and Manchin. (Who are often not on the same page with each other. In other words, we’ll only need to pick off one of them instead of both of them to get anything done.) Winning this Georgia seat is also incredibly important for Democrats heading into a very difficult 2024 election cycle. [**Democrats have already won 50 seats with your support–let’s secure the 51st for a real majority. Chip in now with a donation split between our PAC and Senator Warnock’s campaign>>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSpLhH8vXnJuPwLsPI-rKahdXqrV9MGDP4p58QuL-Z_oxWmTeGyVRjFlYWh-cq8q3cHzkj-_hcPJx9DQZYCsVAFtFZ5DguSID2WBhmZs_dngK3REpIKH6kNOH8yLGv0uYbFwlBdzVbDQhAveIhV3ngigFK3OD9xGUY8ijDn6EhM0nwxaHIhQ-4GMXNArkWpNmX7GOZ_Ul2hQvmCAEBVd0wJzNsoFvnT982EOEu6d5viuU6T0eEpo1gdMMMj-J0rQgmQ-seZ1JUFJHp88c2uCrl3q6E3oyVAEn4pthVO85zHsM/3ra/C8UbUgjlRceBIsXvk0gF5A/h1/o8Fqvo8ht-XjityHj3YgftWzdIPdX3_vgX4b7R8H4bI) But what’s most important for the people of Georgia is that they deserve better representation than Herschel Walker, period. Walker is one of the most dangerous, least qualified Senate candidates we’ve seen this cycle, or in any cycle. He is a serial liar with a documented history of violence. His entire candidacy has been a disgrace. On the other hand, Senator Raphael Warnock, a pastor at the church once led by Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., has served Georgia with dignity and honor. He deserves re-election. clean_body: | | | Peter, , It was a historic midterm election for President Joe Biden and Democrats–but our work isn’t done quite yet. Georgia’s Senate seat is still up for grabs as Raphael Warnock and Herschel Walker face off in a December runoff. And even though we’ve already won the Senate, the stakes remain very high. 51 seats in the Senate versus 50 is actually a big difference. (While a 50-50 Senate allows Vice President Harris to break ties in Democrats’ favor, it’s not actually full control of the Senate.) Winning the 51st seat will allow Democrats to run the Senate without a negotiated power sharing agreement with Mitch McConnell, which has slowed down legislation and nominations. It will give Democrats outright majorities instead of 50-50 splits on each committee, and it will also give Democrats full subpoena power. Even more, winning another seat for a real Democrat will vastly reduce the individual power of obstructionists Sinema and Manchin. (Who are often not on the same page with each other. In other words, we’ll only need to pick off one of them instead of both of them to get anything done.) Winning this Georgia seat is also incredibly important for Democrats heading into a very difficult 2024 election cycle. But what’s most important for the people of Georgia is that they deserve better representation than Herschel Walker, period. Walker is one of the most dangerous, least qualified Senate candidates we’ve seen this cycle, or in any cycle. He is a serial liar with a documented history of violence. His entire candidacy has been a disgrace. On the other hand, Senator Raphael Warnock, a pastor at the church once led by Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., has served Georgia with dignity and honor. He deserves re-election. There’s a lot riding on Georgia’s runoff, and we need to do everything we can to make sure Senator Warnock wins. **** for all you’re doing to help. -Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zphgc0r0e10c2od78ng8s8081egpm45jo5ljil88_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge4or2chh2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2sfstqvck5mcdvl3e1n3bchs697fhqdvgpaudu0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge4or2chh2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbpealt2hugi20d7qoeg6ksj9cg4mhv5vd1e57f0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3ge4or2chh2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund

---
|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: A Conservative Platform for Mississippi – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132688?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Mississippi has elected self-identified “conservatives” to state-wide offices for years.** On behalf of our state’s overwhelmingly conservative voters, we have decided to publish next week a list of actions that any real conservatives ought to support.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=04644b0b1c&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above to read the Conservative Platform for Mississippi_**
| [CLICK HERE](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=512e7232db&e=5703353baa)**to read this list of practical steps that conservatives could implement, and which would achieve real conservative outcomes.**

These are just some of the highlights for our Conservative Platform for Mississippi:

* **CUT TAXES:** With a massive state budget surplus, we support Governor Tate Reeves' recent call for further tax cuts. We will shortly publish a budget showing how both personal income tax and corporation tax can be cut responsibly.
* **RECALL: **Local residents should be given the power to recall ineffective and incompetent mayors.
* **RIGHT OF INITIATIVE: **It is time to fix the right of initiative so that the public are able to vote to change state law.
* **REINS ACT: **Bureaucrats like to make decisions and spend taxpayers’ money without accountability. To combat this, conservatives in our state should support the “Regulations from the Executive in Need of Scrutiny” (REINS) bill.
* **ANTI-ESG:** The ESG (Environmental Social and Governance) agenda promoted by big money managers is forcing publicly listed corporations to promote a “woke” agenda. An anti-ESG bill will help restore the voices of everyday citizens in the economy.
* **A WOMEN’S BILL OF RIGHTS: **Our Women’s Bill of Rights would codify, for purposes of law and regulations, the common sense—and previously self- evident—definition of “woman.”
* **A PARENTS’ BILL OF RIGHTS: **Young people have been subjected to irreversible gender reassignment procedures that they have subsequently come to regret. Our proposal would stop this in our state.
* **NURSE PRACTITIONERS:** Antiquated laws still presume that nurse practitioners are unable to work unless under the supervision of doctors. We believe it is time to give highly trained nurse practitioners more responsibility.

Please look at our Platform, and tell me what you think? I would like your thoughts and views.

As the President & CEO of the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, I will be speaking to groups from Corinth to the Coast about our Platform. Let me know if you need a speaker and would like for me to visit.

We need to advance the conservative cause in our state, and our Platform will help us do exactly that.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7b83a46540&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **_Ps. Happy Thanksgiving! This is only my second ever Thanksgiving in the United States, and I cannot tell you how thankful I am to live right here in Mississippi – the most wonderful state in the greatest Republic on earth! Have a great time!_**
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=ede1ffe3f8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=ede1ffe3f8).

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Being honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
America can't handle this loss
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911790:Jmgo6mG4N:m:1:3368395361:53BA23DC2F4611EC1EB29B24A8488E7D:r)
---
| |
Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911790:Jmgo6mG4N:m:1:3368395361:53BA23DC2F4611EC1EB29B24A8488E7D:r "so I need

name: Rev. Warnock (via Georgia House Democrats)
subject: I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54808313/379736302/-688951218?refcode=EM_FR_221119RWRunoff_SplitRW_RW_90DO_5_NG_N_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTUwYTI3Ni0xMjY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdhundOi3kx9BRz6Kkg8Xs0DSTFUMqGzOltLpZGNpkw=) Peter, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:[_Will you split $5 or more right now between me and the Georgia House Demcocrats to keep Georgia blue?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54808315/379736306/-688951218?refcode=EM_FR_221119RWRunoff_SplitRW_RW_90DO_5_NG_N_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTUwYTI3Ni0xMjY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OdhundOi3kx9BRz6Kkg8Xs0DSTFUMqGzOltLpZGNpkw=)** GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help. **

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 11 years in prison for standing for life
body:
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Peter, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61912705:JgNX6mGNB:m:1:3253819041:A4B645AF0C4B5DEA16C12CAEE83A632B:r) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61912705:JgNX6mGNB:m:1:3253819041:A4B645AF0C4B5DEA16C12CAEE83A632B:r) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61912705:JgNX6mGNB:m:1:3253819041:A4B645AF0C4B5DEA16C12CAEE83A632B:r) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61912705:JgNX6mGNB:m:1:3253819041:A4B645AF0C4B5DEA16C12CAEE83A632B:r)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61912705:JgNX6mGNB:m:1:3253819041:A4B645AF0C4B5DEA16C12CAEE83A632B:r)
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel

clean_body: And we're defending him in court! | | | Peter, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming. Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act... and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family. We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone. Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. body:

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916380:Jz6q6mGNU:m:1:3372944669:E8F6ABA754E4719C4954F4901C0F20C7:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916380:Jz6q6mGNU:m:1:3372944669:E8F6ABA754E4719C4954F4901C0F20C7:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916380:Jz6q6mGNU:m:1:3372944669:E8F6ABA754E4719C4954F4901C0F20C7:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916380:Jz6q6mGNU:m:1:3372944669:E8F6ABA754E4719C4954F4901C0F20C7:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916380:Jz6q6mGNU:m:1:3372944669:E8F6ABA754E4719C4954F4901C0F20C7:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916380:Jz6q6mGNU:m:1:3372944669:E8F6ABA754E4719C4954F4901C0F20C7:r)

---
| |
Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911794:66BjpmGNP:m:1:3369487795:9D271AD4CBA2F533EBE280FBF7E215FF:r "so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_

I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, _**[so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911794:66BjpmGNP:m:1:3369487795:9D271AD4CBA2F533EBE280FBF7E215FF:r "so can I count on you

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: At times, these past two years were incredibly frustrating as the world often had to wait on the whims of Joe Manchin & Kyrsten Sinema to see if ground-breaking, and often life-saving legislation would be passed. Keeping Raphael Warnock in the Senate will help President Biden overcome their foot-dragging.
body:
Keep a good Senator
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f467bf2-ab55-4bd2-b33b-d038fc1c31a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **_There is no case where Republicans are better than Democrats, but there are many cases where some Democrats are far superior to others._** **_At times, these past two years were incredibly frustrating as the world often had to wait on the whims of Joe Manchin & Kyrsten Sinema to see if ground-breaking, and often life-saving legislation would be passed._** **[Will you join us in making Manchin and Sinema less relevant, but giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Senator Warnock's effort to hold his Senate seat in the runoff on December 6th?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84498c51-6a1e-4f60-b090-dcab60c49128/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Our goal was to get 52 Senate seats, so they'd become irrelevant. But, even without that cushion, another reliable Democrat like Senator Rapael Warnock (as we've already added Senator-Elect John Fetterman) will make a huge difference. But one example--we'll have an extra member on committees so Manchin or Sinema won't be needed to bring legislation out of committee and to a full Senate vote on the floor. HUGE._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Keep a good man in the Senate**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef182474-58ce-4988-8687-d2495582e2e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_We could afford to lose one of them and continue the incredible Biden record--from the COVID stimulus to the infrastructure bill, the first gun safety legislation in a generation to the incredible Inflation Reduction Act. If President Biden could get this done while having to deal with the egos of both Sinema & Manchin, because he could count on Senator Warnock, imagine how much more we could get done for the American people, democracy and good progressive policy._** **[Will you join us in making Manchin and Sinema less relevant, but giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Senator Warnock's effort to hold his Senate seat in the runoff on December 6th?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf73ff96-4457-48a5-a68d-76c5f4561b38/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thank you for fighting for a better Senate!**
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcfe0a352-8123-439c-bad0-c97ae57f7124/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/warnock-manchin-synema-main-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbd57f7d3-54ee-486e-ace6-321a3060754e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

| | If you want to see Raphael Warnock re-elected, then you're in the right place. GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.**

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c0d140e8761740e79f069c449b2f1be7&_e=IYkpoYGnEB8GrWHFPfqDyF2SuvwwOSG6wyMPfE4xIPSQzCq-Cll7PyEEZjmNOfnwN42PmwxBq48clO-6TiNFJckWerodXg3Cq78U0i47ikGjtv-VPRcCHXd5sgLg0sAR7zREhzwvUJmHpTsqMy06Qgc64090BKO6ssBYLLpft_lTYLZ9dyrv0aYP5Y-eqszUr-ZEMT5vUl7cbGYlKChB3cNVqgreNaAl0EXaMAWKrUD96qDfRKUTxvVMbVk9k9Rk3XazOvpPWY1lEpPHx4GshI3k0l9VdtBBMvODGBN1QXSCLzu2Zc41khAtzqFlreLqIvEywe-002KmA8dvwM_HP_FKS1L4IWuBzJX1IWxyQSqfmpnGzd7Sa7BVUb3YnIMkkodjGCYeAHxT0jk8fh_n32WKi_5RbdkWqsKgg-vlyco%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” – Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” – Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” – Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE–starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c0d140e8761740e79f069c449b2f1be7&_e=IYkpoYGnEB8GrWHFPfqDyF2SuvwwOSG6wyMPfE4xIPSQzCq-Cll7PyEEZjmNOfnwN42PmwxBq48clO-6TiNFJckWerodXg3Cq78U0i47ikGjtv-VPRcCHXd5sgLg0sAR7zREhzwvUJmHpTsqMy06Qgc64090BKO6ssBYLLpft_lTYLZ9dyrv0aYP5Y-eqszUr-ZEMT5vUl7cbGYlKChB3SlU0x0TDD7_uSCHRQz7dYpDI6HriS9DvYbIhP0JcWGQ81OC7JocW04yHGCgULJOfsJ6MGlh235KT8wGK-UptVHn9aPaWxEau_km5hB_vz6sjwMw7JKdVETYe0H9tNwRlF62NtPH4tUVfZO6uV7x_5eBy2tclSzHxa0wsz1kg3e3ZWTVbfZedcIsqfWEzYgH0SYTCkyr-_IYy6iTk4wJvMI%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife. Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course. “Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” – Tammy from Georgia “The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” – Bob from Colorado “It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” – Mark from Washington Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE–starting November 29. Reserve your spot here: I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith. Warm Regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Draft DeSantis
subject: Look at the damage Biden caused
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61914234:J474pmGNg:m:1:3331703221:A37645D608843F10DE96D8E4A660217C:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61914234:J474pmGNg:m:1:3331703221:A37645D608843F10DE96D8E4A660217C:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61914234:J474pmGNg:m:1:3331703221:A37645D608843F10DE96D8E4A660217C:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

name: Giffords.org
subject: here’s a wild story for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When Gabby started her work on gun safety a decade ago, the launch was wildly successful.
#

Friends -
When Gabby started her work on gun safety a decade ago, the launch was wildly successful. We raised millions of dollars in a very short period of time—a lot of it coming from small-dollar donations.
We were eager to put it to work electorally, especially after the Senate voted to filibuster expanded background checks legislation. After all, we had pledged that if Congress wouldn’t act to make our communities safer from gun violence, we’d elect a Congress that would.
But most DC organizations were mortified by the idea. They wanted talk of guns nowhere near the 2014 races. Some even suggested we use the money to run ads that didn’t even mention guns.
Fast forward a few elections from then, and gun violence prevention is not just a winning issue, it’s a hugely motivating issue. And one that cuts across partisan divides.
None of that happens without people like you.
None of it happens without your phone calls to Congress, your social media posts, your volunteering, and yes, your donations. Because ALL OF IT sends a message about the strength of movement.
And that’s the key to creating change: making politicians realize they have more to fear from us than the NRA.
But we still have a long way to go. Gun violence is still an epidemic in this country. And we will not stop until that epidemic ends:
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC today? We will put your donation right to work passing legislation in states and Congress that make our communities safer from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov22.2v05GQ&refcode=em221119-1-15&t=1&akid=2767%2E3935704%2Ehx43Nw)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Mat
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb3663ddf8f647d7a496a24ef399a7a4&_e=7WOvBq0lFNChco0sLWUY5OW5uImOsuBOXSO8pZ0e7ArIFQbfBpSgber5WsrpQAetKZFCajOKeefySVKZrmyZpNJ268a-nnXa6Ke7ibLmjMNhMyDl5o9Q5iOHJ7wbaZZTHCz9ZuhUlgs-si5xq5QvU0L-fltseW0-T6u378_ydmDuc5woWMaAP4Xf3vqRfI-KRcOIGYvXBJ-YziqLfzS7EhhAEL151lj0OyKdd-yhkD21ibGY44RGGs8PDC0AW_MaldImMkhviUTh1572ONCmkoQJTboeiOxqXe6uyOctw18%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb3663ddf8f647d7a496a24ef399a7a4&_e=7WOvBq0lFNChco0sLWUY5OW5uImOsuBOXSO8pZ0e7ArIFQbfBpSgber5WsrpQAetKZFCajOKeefySVKZrmyZpNJ268a-nnXa6Ke7ibLmjMNhMyDl5o9Q5iOHJ7wbaZZTHCz9ZuhUlgs-si5xq5QvUwhSKfPG8rDVV8Hv0GtrEV-Wsji2pvgB38FA3pi4G5Mg_Mr26UcZu5o7XbsAsIkhrae-xlMVDni3olRo7eHCKrpc7C_r6-1QjSB07tF2bFr8MET8xpBumVBlG-FnMYs_1ROqR93PzkXkr-kGSz4zyGE%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.
