clean_body: I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Mat Friend, I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you're thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, "what about them is influential?!" This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren't, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here 's how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?" It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. " If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bd700100ec2430fb03a69eeb69a8375&_e=8noiCL4iTZgTe17gHXvL88KmS8Wo__LgvCooX5JTKxMQmQEFJzyubyEfpA9w0jMAeqrU8nWYqpsxq5G1otiHhM3fWrc9FP3GfdZPKU6Ka4QFemRGk1nXN20VBfRmBDAdk117B7SDVaBs6gzCcpGVO3cVC2DyciUbMWsn0a88uw9IvMgnfV0bpQU-Kmny6o9duBW_-jtRgtzNljs6FkAEn0M2Q-lsExV9gSXWWb1h5UhIqOtnTroidP8VMWUGLkBtq-kQsP1RrwoZL0GbAJ6rK32vzWbQ_-rkTS9u5NUqEbo%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bd700100ec2430fb03a69eeb69a8375&_e=8noiCL4iTZgTe17gHXvL88KmS8Wo__LgvCooX5JTKxMQmQEFJzyubyEfpA9w0jMAeqrU8nWYqpsxq5G1otiHhM3fWrc9FP3GfdZPKU6Ka4QFemRGk1nXN20VBfRmBDAdk117B7SDVaBs6gzCcpGVO1YfjiPGHGSsCKxtGQLbGB-6gCBZ2TMlf6GzQNf095d4lW9L1Tb7pg54xJApyYvYjAGNG8miC14FmQ9rmoC-66154YvKTmVhn6oJeI3vrQJAXWXkJzX9ISr235smJ_AKS8_Yq_zHONc8p9dAETvTQd0%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bd700100ec2430fb03a69eeb69a8375&_e=8noiCL4iTZgTe17gHXvL88KmS8Wo__LgvCooX5JTKxMQmQEFJzyubyEfpA9w0jMAeqrU8nWYqpsxq5G1otiHhM3fWrc9FP3GfdZPKU6Ka4QFemRGk1nXN20VBfRmBDAdk117B7SDVaBs6gzCcpGVO1e6mV-c47txq2xyaG3IwYaaQyxNBP4uQZRQHtBLT7pj53PQh3zhg1Re3ozY-noL4-jdoMI8w8vI-jfEYAsornGts3Xet-PkUSy80ugX6hoARL8iooqLCETswqA1aEXacXM22gf7OHard_-gLhZSXhs%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bd700100ec2430fb03a69eeb69a8375&_e=8noiCL4iTZgTe17gHXvL88KmS8Wo__LgvCooX5JTKxMQmQEFJzyubyEfpA9w0jMAeqrU8nWYqpsxq5G1otiHhM3fWrc9FP3GfdZPKU6Ka4QFemRGk1nXN20VBfRmBDAdk117B7SDVaBs6gzCcpGVOxBsHSkFamaluCSo9QzkehSUm6Pvzori26pnNAHePxAn0lgphbmAc14NkrAM_ryhneKHCkHpb0-JrZyHM0QVoSd6eTB65L9dCfSBKic4LHBhVQzhsT0xlS6UQ0DrB6oxGrYQEnVH7ZhP3CoW3nXMGco%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bd700100ec2430fb03a69eeb69a8375&_e=8noiCL4iTZgTe17gHXvL88KmS8Wo__LgvCooX5JTKxMQmQEFJzyubyEfpA9w0jMAeqrU8nWYqpsxq5G1otiHhM3fWrc9FP3GfdZPKU6Ka4QFemRGk1nXN20VBfRmBDAdk117B7SDVaBs6gzCcpGVOzkj7iTvXAKYvuRGQ2abODRbuwD2h6lWV1Zs-Frh2eZdry_9yz2P2rLwh-d4McBLeW3kcugU7JS76QsFF9qZ_7p0IuKh2abHpgxA_p9VDZp1vBmvAmcNcD_mTljh1NNztRhpuyTtGjOb3NnNFIv-QVk%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bd700100ec2430fb03a69eeb69a8375&_e=8noiCL4iTZgTe17gHXvL88KmS8Wo__LgvCooX5JTKxMQmQEFJzyubyEfpA9w0jMAeqrU8nWYqpsxq5G1otiHhM3fWrc9FP3GfdZPKU6Ka4QFemRGk1nXN20VBfRmBDAdk117B7SDVaBs6gzCcpGVOw9Fyf6I5krJsKrMdmTOkqH7BN7HkBLh1TtDYsR9YLV6s80Z9M04PXL347X2BqNVNQTNKkyuroRGmwaaYlv6RXFH7HmwC4BW6c7UJl4tuXFCQ3V7oUvLv6rTB6I72Rnk0UcaA31GA-kNRd425UqFUb0%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bd700100ec2430fb03a69eeb69a8375&_e=8noiCL4iTZgTe17gHXvL88KmS8Wo__LgvCooX5JTKxMQmQEFJzyubyEfpA9w0jMAeqrU8nWYqpsxq5G1otiHhM3fWrc9FP3GfdZPKU6Ka4QFemRGk1nXN20VBfRmBDAdk117B7SDVaBs6gzCcpGVO0YuxVSOHqACH6ElFjgXvVca14FTcC2uNnLW84pjVQTLZh1aKNu9Lowo-oFD8fHjCUMQbD_hG9-vtQLBo88Prax0HlDrBRcIq5YcSdRBWqhVvDeKcyA6HYBIUW3JExq84gXSsHQGQ6UG83gSt_qNPYw%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bd700100ec2430fb03a69eeb69a8375&_e=8noiCL4iTZgTe17gHXvL88KmS8Wo__LgvCooX5JTKxMQmQEFJzyubyEfpA9w0jMAeqrU8nWYqpsxq5G1otiHhM3fWrc9FP3GfdZPKU6Ka4QFemRGk1nXN20VBfRmBDAdk117B7SDVaBs6gzCcpGVO-lLSSCXUtGHLpxVXpcQ4EH5ppZzKt-OHSwUPi39jjbR2502Qutvxv7aj6OoTwDlcmYSbm879dZOfu7zd02HHcYWV_GsPXoFPP73hQmamvJjZbuB8O6uy-Q52f2i7opsaBqw3xx3z70bIt1VUqTkXb0%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Raphael
subject: I'm fighting in the Senate to make sure every child can achieve their American dream.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation toward our crucial midnight fundraising goal so we can keep this Senate seat blue. **But first, let me explain why your donation _right now_ is so important – and what could happen to our bold agenda without it.**
I’m humbled to represent Georgia in the Senate as its first-ever Black senator. Growing up in public housing, my family was short on money but long on love and faith. Through hard work and the support of my community, I became the first in my family to graduate from college – and then, the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm fighting in the Senate to make sure every child __ can achieve their American dream.
**But with the results from the general election showing me narrowly leading Trump's handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker, I need your urgent grassroots support to win this crucial runoff election on Dec. 6:[Will you give $5 or more now – before tonight's critical fundraising deadline – to defend this seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54814790/379763033/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4478-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDNmNzVkYi0xYTY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhaxMQNxzGIgx5graVX6_3rA6YiWs-l8vInnAQLpQUA=)**

I'll be blunt: Experts are saying this runoff election will be incredibly close. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment are coming after me with everything they’ve got.
**Trump held megadonor fundraisers for my opponent, and McConnell is mobilizing his super PACs to spend MILLIONS to crush me and turn Georgia red.**
**I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so the only way I can fight back and win this race is with the support of every member of this grassroots team.[I'm personally asking: Will you give $5 or more right now so we can stay on track to hit our weekly fundraising goal, keep Georgia blue, and defend this Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54814794/379763035/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4478-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDNmNzVkYi0xYTY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhaxMQNxzGIgx5graVX6_3rA6YiWs-l8vInnAQLpQUA=)**
Thank you. I deeply appreciate your support.
– Sen. Raphael Warnock

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
The battle isn’t over. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/3217fc65d318c26f/4522cf5c3bee34eec3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, As the dust settles on the 2022 election season, I just wanted to send you a quick note to thank you again for all of your great support. I’m truly honored by the trust Oklahoma voters have placed in me – and I’m looking forward to representing our commonsense conservative values in Congress for another two years! Earlier this week, my peers in the Republican Study Committee unanimously elected me to serve as the Chairman next year. I'm humbled and honored to lead the largest caucus on Capitol Hill! Our goal is to pass conservative policy and get as many conservative priorities over the finish line as possible in our new Republican Majority. But make no mistake – the battle is far from over. With Democrats keeping control of the U.S. Senate and Joe Biden still in the White House, it’s going to be a long road ahead. We’re going to need all hands on deck to block the Radical Left’s destructive agenda and get our country back on track. **_Will you please make a generous donation today to fuel our efforts in the fight ahead?_**

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Peter: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**

My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.

Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:**

clean_body: | Peter: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it. My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’ll be quick, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
America can't handle this loss
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911802:JargrmGNH:m:1:3370555685:CC87C19F83943C9AFF1ED4915C0D873E:r)
---
| |
Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20221119-8139-header&t=1&akid=8139%2E434096%2EXl5fay)
Derek, I just want to say _thank you._
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
**We know we can win this — we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far — which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That's why I'm asking directly: **[Will you split $5 between my campaign and John Fetterman right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221119-1?refcode=em20221119-8139&refcode2=8139_434096_Xl5fay&akid=8139%2E434096%2EXl5fay)**
**[Donate Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221119-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221119-8139&refcode2=8139_434096_Xl5fay&akid=8139%2E434096%2EXl5fay)**
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race — but not without grassroots support.**
**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:****[Will you split $5 or more between my campaign and John Fetterman right now to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221119-1?refcode=em20221119-8139&refcode2=8139_434096_Xl5fay&akid=8139%2E434096%2EXl5fay)**
Thank you for your support.
— Rev. Raphael Warnock

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
---|---|---
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8139%2E434096%2EXl5fay)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8139%2E434096%2EXl5fay)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Make Amazon Pay, Georgia Runoff, Starbucks Rebellion & more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Black Friday: Make Amazon Pay! | Ro Khanna: A New Vision |
Georgia Runoff | 9 New House Allies | Dirty Deal Round 2 | Starbucks Red
Cup Rebellion | One Fair Wage | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1011&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

This Thanksgiving we are grateful for the solidarity of all our movement
allies here and around the world.

On Black Friday, Our Revolution is leading US protests as part of a global
day of action to Make Amazon Pay — pay its workers, pay its taxes, and pay
for its climate damage.

Join us in coalition with 80 unions and organizations holding strikes and
rallies in 32 countries to fight back against Amazon squeezing every last
drop it can from people and the planet.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8053?t=1012&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]FIND A BLACK FRIDAY ACTION NEAR YOU

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1013&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

Progressives won the 2022 midterms! Our movement fended off a red wave,
flipped a Senate seat, added 9 new progressives to the House, and grew our
power down-ballot.

Thanks to you, Our Revolution organizers and volunteers made more than 4M
voter contacts — 2M calls and texts — to make the difference in tight
races.

“You got the vote out, you got young people out,” US Rep. Ro Khanna said
on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8054?t=1014&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]National Organize-to-Win Call Monday. “Progressives can be very
proud.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1015&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

Ro said he is particularly proud of John Fetterman, “the resiliency he
showed — and he showed our message works and we held the Senate.”

As a progressive populist, Fetterman gained in every PA county — his
strongest gains in rural areas — won back red counties like Erie, which
voted Obama twice then Trump.

Running on healthcare for all, the union way of life, and raising wages —
Fetterman did better with independents than any other Dem Senate
candidate.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1016&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

“This sends a clear message and roadmap that going into 2024 Democrats
must lean into the popularity of the progressive platform, not write it
off,” Joseph Geevarghese, Our Revolution Executive Director, told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8011?t=1017&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]The
Guardian.

Ro Khanna is taking that [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8055?t=1018&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]message on tour, laying out a new vision for
Democrats from economic patriotism to democracy reform to foreign policy.

“So many communities have been left out of economic revitalization, but we
have a 21st Century plan to reverse deindustrialization,” he said. “That
means investing in people.”

“Medicare for All is a patriotic investment, free public education helps
our economy,” Ro explained. “Housing costs are soaring because Wall Street
is buying up homes, gas prices go up while Big Oil makes record profits —
this is a production agenda and an agenda that serves the working class.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1019&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

GEORGIA RUNOFF!

Our Revolution is going all-in to make sure we re-elect Raphael Warnock,
secure the 51st vote in the Senate, and diminish the power of
obstructionists like Joe Manchin.

In 2020, our targeted voter outreach helped Sen. Warnock win his first
Georgia runoff, and we can be the margin of victory in this race.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1020&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

Our Revolution Phonebank Force made 2 million calls and texts in the
midterms, and we’re keeping the energy going for the Georgia Runoff.

Help us cut through the attack ads, make personal connections with voters,
and defeat Hershel Walker once and for all. Call shifts to start after
Thanksgiving.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8017?t=1021&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]CALL GEORGIA VOTERS

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1022&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

If you can’t volunteer, you can help by contributing to our Georgia Runoff
Fund. Every donation helps power our targeted voter outreach work to turn
out more than 150,000 progressive voters in the state!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8012?t=1023&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]DONATE TO OUR EMERGENCY GEORGIA FUND

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1024&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

Get ready! Nine new Our Revolution-endorsed members are heading to
Congress to take on the corporatist wing of the party.

“The House may not be in Democratic hands, but we’ve got a stronger
progressive block that will have an outsized influence on administration
policy,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8056?t=1025&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]Daily Beast.

“We’ll have progressives leading the push on the administration to use
executive action, regulatory authority, and appointment powers to push
progressive priorities,” Joseph said.

New Our Revolution-backed Congress members include: Greg Casar (TX-35),
Delia Ramirez (IL-3), Maxwell Frost (FL-10), Summer Lee (PA-12), Jasmine
Crockett (TX-30), Jonathan Jackson (IL-1), Becca Balint (VT), Andrea
Salinas (OR-6), and Val Hoyle (OR-4).

[ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=1026&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]Become a recurring donor to Our Revolution as we partner with new
allies in Congress to fight for our policy agenda!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1027&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

MAKE AMAZON PAY ON BLACK FRIDAY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1028&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

Amazon is squeezing every last drop it can from workers, communities, and
the planet.

That’s why Our Revolution is leading actions on Black Friday as part of a
global day of action to Make Amazon Pay — pay workers, pay taxes, and pay
for the climate.

We are proud to be in coalition with 80 unions and organizations holding
strikes and rallies against the corporate giant in 32 countries.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8053?t=1029&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]Join us in NYC, DC, Philadelphia, Bessemer AL, Detroit, St. Louis, and
many other US cities — in international solidarity with workers in
Bangladesh, Cambodia, the Philippines, Columbia, and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1030&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

“This is a fight for environmental justice, worker justice, tax justice,
but also other struggles,” James Schneider of Progressive International
said on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8054?t=1031&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]LIVE National Call Monday.

“In South Africa, the indigenous movement is standing up because Amazon
wants to bulldoze sacred land and rivers for its regional headquarters,”
James said.

We are workers and citizens divided by geography and our role in the
global economy, but we’re united to Make Amazon Pay fair wages, its taxes,
and for its impact on the planet.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8053?t=1032&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]TAKE ACTION TO MAKE AMAZON PAY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1033&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

DIRTY DEAL ROUND 2

In September, Our Revolution and our network of allies rallied to defeat
the Dirty Deal, which would fast-track fossil fuel projects and gut
frontline community protections.

Well, it’s rearing its ugly head again, and Alice Madden, Policy and
Political Director for Greenpeace, joined our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8054?t=1034&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]National Organizing Call
on Monday to stop it once more.

“Senator Manchin is still trying to fast-track approvals for oil, gas, and
coal projects,” Alice said. “This Dirty Deal would sacrifice lives, lock
communities into more pollution, silence local voices, and sabotage our
climate goals.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1035&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

Manchin aims to include the Dirty Deal in upcoming must-pass legislation —
and some in Democratic leadership have a mind to help him pass it.

“Manchin has already begun his maneuverings, and the bill has gotten even
worse,” Alice told us. “Failure is really not an option, We must work in
solidarity to amplify strong congressional and frontline opposition.”

In Round 1, Our Revolution members made thousands of calls to their
Members of Congress to leverage the power of the people. Can we count on
you to be ready for Round 2?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/dirty_deal_ty/?t=1036&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]SIGN UP TO JOIN THE RAPID RESPONSE TEAM

★ ★ ★

ORNJ JOINS LABOR FORUM w/ CHRIS SMALLS

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1037&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

Our Revolution - Hillsborough, NJ had the opportunity to advocate for the
PRO Act with Amazon Labor Union, Starbucks Workers United, and Apple
Workers Union at the NJEA Convention on Saturday.

Organizer Didier Jimenez [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8057?t=1038&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]spoke on the labor panel with ALU’s Christian
Smalls and others about the state of unions and our fight to keep growing
a resurgent labor movement in America.

★ ★ ★

STARBUCKS RED CUP REBELLION

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1039&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

Our Revolution New Jersey rallied with striking Starbucks workers Thursday
at Red Cup Rebellion actions.

We stood with baristas in Montclair, Hopewell and Summit NJ,
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8058?t=1040&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]amplifying the demand for a fair contract, fair staffing, and the
living wages and benefits that all workers deserve.

Solidarity with Starbucks Workers United organizers in New Jersey and
across the country!

★ ★ ★

FIGHTING FOR ONE FAIR WAGE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1041&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

On Thursday, Our Revolution joined One Fair Wage for the Server for an
Hour event at the Hyattsville Busboys & Poets, where progressive Maryland
elected officials — including new Prince Geoge’s County Councilmember
Krystal Oriadha — served lunch.

“We are excited to work with One Fair Wage to eliminate the sub-minimum
wage,” said Our Revolution National Coordinator Hal Ginsberg. “The success
of passing Initiative 82 to end the practice in DC shows the power and
popularity of the movement.”

Among attendees were: Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph
Geevarghese, One Fair Wage President Saru Jarayaman, Our Revolution MD
co-founder Wala Blegay, and long-time Our Revolution MD member Danny
Schaible. Like Krystal, Wala is starting her first term on the Prince
George’s County Council, while Danny is a Hyattsville City Councilmember.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1042&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

Our Revolution joined 45 organizations in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8059?t=1043&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]urging Congress this week to
pass two popular, bipartisan antitrust bills to rein in Big Tech before
January.

The American Innovation and Choice Online Act and the Open App Markets Act
would enable fair competition on tech platforms and app markets, giving
small businesses a fair shot and empowering citizens with more choice.

The bills are popular. In a recent poll, 77% of voters agreed Big Tech was
too powerful and 65% were more likely to support their representative if
they voted for more regulation.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1044&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1045&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

Our Revolution NYPAN and progressive groups across New York are calling
for the removal and replacement of Jay Jacobs, who is not fit to serve as
Chair of the State Democratic Party.

“It’s time for Gov. Kathy Hochul to work with the party to elect a
focused, determined, unifying party leader,” our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8060?t=1046&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]letter reads. “The
state party lost 4 winnable seats, giving the U.S. House to Republicans -
and the responsibility lies squarely with Jacobs.”

As chair, Jacobs has spent much of his time blaming progressives. But,
while NYPAN and our allies worked tirelessly to get out the vote in NY,
the party establishment was nowhere to be found.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1047&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

This is the same Jay Jacobs who supported disgraced ex-Gov. Cuomo, tried
to cancel the 2020 primary, and opposed Democratic primary winner India
Walton for Buffalo Mayor.

“I called for Jay Jacobs’ resignation a year ago and I still hold that
position,” US Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez said Wednesday. Last week, she
said NYPAN is well-organized and positioned to fill the leadership gap.

It is long past time to reform the NY State Democratic Party. But we must
begin with leadership. Only then can we forge ahead together.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/sign/petition-drop-jay-jacobs/?t=1048&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]JACOBS HAS TO GO!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1049&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8052?t=1050&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ][IMG]

On Black Friday, Our Revolution is leading US protests as part of a global
day of action to Make Amazon Pay — pay its workers, pay its taxes, and pay
for its climate damage.

Join us in coalition with 80 unions and ally organizations holding strikes
and rallies in 32 countries to fight back against Amazon squeezing every
last drop it can from people and the planet.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8053?t=1051&akid=3777%2E5885482%2Ed3Ao52 ]FIND AN ACTION NEAR YOU

★ ★ ★

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Insider News from the Political Revolution! HEADLINES: Black Friday: Make Amazon Pay! | Ro Khanna: A New Vision | Georgia Runoff | 9 New House Allies | Dirty Deal Round 2 | Starbucks Red Cup Rebellion | One Fair Wage | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] This Thanksgiving we are grateful for the solidarity of all our movement allies here and around the world. On Black Friday, Our Revolution is leading US protests as part of a global day of action to Make Amazon Pay — pay its workers, pay its taxes, and pay for its climate damage. Join us in coalition with 80 unions and organizations holding strikes and rallies in 32 countries to fight back against Amazon squeezing every last drop it can from people and the planet. [ ]FIND A BLACK FRIDAY ACTION NEAR YOU ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Progressives won the 2022 midterms! Our movement fended off a red wave, flipped a Senate seat, added 9 new progressives to the House, and grew our power down-ballot. Thanks to you, Our Revolution organizers and volunteers made more than 4M voter contacts — 2M calls and texts — to make the difference in tight races. “You got the vote out, you got young people out,” US Rep. Ro Khanna said on our [ ]National Organize-to-Win Call Monday. “Progressives can be very proud.” [ ][IMG] Ro said he is particularly proud of John Fetterman, “the resiliency he showed — and he showed our message works and we held the Senate.” As a progressive populist, Fetterman gained in every PA county — his strongest gains in rural areas — won back red counties like Erie, which voted Obama twice then Trump. Running on healthcare for all, the union way of life, and raising wages — Fetterman did better with independents than any other Dem Senate candidate. [ ][IMG] “This sends a clear message and roadmap that going into 2024 Democrats must lean into the popularity of the progressive platform, not write it off,” Joseph Geevarghese, Our Revolution Executive Director, told [ ]The Guardian. Ro Khanna is taking that [ ]message on tour, laying out a new vision for Democrats from economic patriotism to democracy reform to foreign policy. “So many communities have been left out of economic revitalization, but we have a 21st Century plan to reverse deindustrialization,” he said. “That means investing in people.” “Medicare for All is a patriotic investment, free public education helps our economy,” Ro explained. “Housing costs are soaring because Wall Street is buying up homes, gas prices go up while Big Oil makes record profits — this is a production agenda and an agenda that serves the working class.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] GEORGIA RUNOFF! Our Revolution is going all-in to make sure we re-elect Raphael Warnock, secure the 51st vote in the Senate, and diminish the power of obstructionists like Joe Manchin. In 2020, our targeted voter outreach helped Sen. Warnock win his first Georgia runoff, and we can be the margin of victory in this race. [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Phonebank Force made 2 million calls and texts in the midterms, and we’re keeping the energy going for the Georgia Runoff. Help us cut through the attack ads, make personal connections with voters, and defeat Hershel Walker once and for all. Call shifts to start after Thanksgiving. [ ]CALL GEORGIA VOTERS [ ][IMG] If you can’t volunteer, you can help by contributing to our Georgia Runoff Fund. Every donation helps power our targeted voter outreach work to turn out more than 150,000 progressive voters in the state! [ ]DONATE TO OUR EMERGENCY GEORGIA FUND ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Get ready! Nine new Our Revolution-endorsed members are heading to Congress to take on the corporatist wing of the party. “The House may not be in Democratic hands, but we’ve got a stronger progressive block that will have an outsized influence on administration policy,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]Daily Beast. “We’ll have progressives leading the push on the administration to use executive action, regulatory authority, and appointment powers to push progressive priorities,” Joseph said. New Our Revolution-backed Congress members include: Greg Casar (TX-35), Delia Ramirez (IL-3), Maxwell Frost (FL-10), Summer Lee (PA-12), Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Jonathan Jackson (IL-1), Becca Balint (VT), Andrea Salinas (OR-6), and Val Hoyle (OR-4). [ ]Become a recurring donor to Our Revolution as we partner with new allies in Congress to fight for our policy agenda! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ MAKE AMAZON PAY ON BLACK FRIDAY [ ][IMG] Amazon is squeezing every last drop it can from workers, communities, and the planet. That’s why Our Revolution is leading actions on Black Friday as part of a global day of action to Make Amazon Pay — pay workers, pay taxes, and pay for the climate. We are proud to be in coalition with 80 unions and organizations holding strikes and rallies against the corporate giant in 32 countries. [ ]Join us in NYC, DC, Philadelphia, Bessemer AL, Detroit, St. Louis, and many other US cities — in international solidarity with workers in Bangladesh, Cambodia, the Philippines, Columbia, and more. [ ][IMG] “This is a fight for environmental justice, worker justice, tax justice, but also other struggles,” James Schneider of Progressive International said on our [ ]LIVE National Call Monday. “In South Africa, the indigenous movement is standing up because Amazon wants to bulldoze sacred land and rivers for its regional headquarters,” James said. We are workers and citizens divided by geography and our role in the global economy, but we’re united to Make Amazon Pay fair wages, its taxes, and for its impact on the planet. [ ]TAKE ACTION TO MAKE AMAZON PAY ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] DIRTY DEAL ROUND 2 In September, Our Revolution and our network of allies rallied to defeat the Dirty Deal, which would fast-track fossil fuel projects and gut frontline community protections. Well, it’s rearing its ugly head again, and Alice Madden, Policy and Political Director for Greenpeace, joined our [ ]National Organizing Call on Monday to stop it once more. “Senator Manchin is still trying to fast-track approvals for oil, gas, and coal projects,” Alice said. “This Dirty Deal would sacrifice lives, lock communities into more pollution, silence local voices, and sabotage our climate goals.” [ ][IMG] Manchin aims to include the Dirty Deal in upcoming must-pass legislation — and some in Democratic leadership have a mind to help him pass it. “Manchin has already begun his maneuverings, and the bill has gotten even worse,” Alice told us. “Failure is really not an option, We must work in solidarity to amplify strong congressional and frontline opposition.” In Round 1, Our Revolution members made thousands of calls to their Members of Congress to leverage the power of the people. Can we count on you to be ready for Round 2? [ ]SIGN UP TO JOIN THE RAPID RESPONSE TEAM ★ ★ ★ ORNJ JOINS LABOR FORUM w/ CHRIS SMALLS [ ][IMG] Our Revolution - Hillsborough, NJ had the opportunity to advocate for the PRO Act with Amazon Labor Union, Starbucks Workers United, and Apple Workers Union at the NJEA Convention on Saturday. Organizer Didier Jimenez [ ]spoke on the labor panel with ALU’s Christian Smalls and others about the state of unions and our fight to keep growing a resurgent labor movement in America. ★ ★ ★ STARBUCKS RED CUP REBELLION [ ][IMG] Our Revolution New Jersey rallied with striking Starbucks workers Thursday at Red Cup Rebellion actions. We stood with baristas in Montclair, Hopewell and Summit NJ, [ ]amplifying the demand for a fair contract, fair staffing, and the living wages and benefits that all workers deserve. Solidarity with Starbucks Workers United organizers in New Jersey and across the country! ★ ★ ★ FIGHTING FOR ONE FAIR WAGE [ ][IMG] On Thursday, Our Revolution joined One Fair Wage for the Server for an Hour event at the Hyattsville Busboys & Poets, where progressive Maryland elected officials — including new Prince Geoge’s County Councilmember Krystal Oriadha — served lunch. “We are excited to work with One Fair Wage to eliminate the sub-minimum wage,” said Our Revolution National Coordinator Hal Ginsberg. “The success of passing Initiative 82 to end the practice in DC shows the power and popularity of the movement.” Among attendees were: Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese, One Fair Wage President Saru Jarayaman, Our Revolution MD co-founder Wala Blegay, and long-time Our Revolution MD member Danny Schaible. Like Krystal, Wala is starting her first term on the Prince George’s County Council, while Danny is a Hyattsville City Councilmember. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution joined 45 organizations in [ ]urging Congress this week to pass two popular, bipartisan antitrust bills to rein in Big Tech before January. The American Innovation and Choice Online Act and the Open App Markets Act would enable fair competition on tech platforms and app markets, giving small businesses a fair shot and empowering citizens with more choice. The bills are popular. In a recent poll, 77% of voters agreed Big Tech was too powerful and 65% were more likely to support their representative if they voted for more regulation. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution NYPAN and progressive groups across New York are calling for the removal and replacement of Jay Jacobs, who is not fit to serve as Chair of the State Democratic Party. “It’s time for Gov. Kathy Hochul to work with the party to elect a focused, determined, unifying party leader,” our [ ]letter reads. “The state party lost 4 winnable seats, giving the U.S. House to Republicans - and the responsibility lies squarely with Jacobs.” As chair, Jacobs has spent much of his time blaming progressives. But, while NYPAN and our allies worked tirelessly to get out the vote in NY, the party establishment was nowhere to be found. [ ][IMG] This is the same Jay Jacobs who supported disgraced ex-Gov. Cuomo, tried to cancel the 2020 primary, and opposed Democratic primary winner India Walton for Buffalo Mayor. “I called for Jay Jacobs’ resignation a year ago and I still hold that position,” US Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez said Wednesday. Last week, she said NYPAN is well-organized and positioned to fill the leadership gap. It is long past time to reform the NY State Democratic Party. But we must begin with leadership. Only then can we forge ahead together. [ ]JACOBS HAS TO GO! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] On Black Friday, Our Revolution is leading US protests as part of a global day of action to Make Amazon Pay — pay its workers, pay its taxes, and pay for its climate damage. Join us in coalition with 80 unions and ally organizations holding strikes and rallies in 32 countries to fight back against Amazon squeezing every last drop it can from people and the planet. Help us out-organize the right-wing money and propaganda, turn out 150,000 progressive voters in Georgia, and defeat Hershel Walker once and for all. Volunteer with us to help elect Senator Warnock, defeat Herschel Walker, and save the Senate! Peter, there is some disturbing news breaking right now.

The Democrats **just launched $11 million in advertising campaigns for the Georgia runoff. **

These ads smear Herschel Walker because Dems just can't stand the idea that a black, conservative Christian can win in Georgia. And they're doing everything possible to stop Herschel from being successful.

It's not surprising that liberal mega-donors would help Raphael Warnock and the Democrat Super PACs refill their coffers, but after spending everything he had in the General Election, Herschel has nothing to fight back with.

**[We're asking for just a couple of bucks - help Herschel finish the fight by giving $25 to Herschel.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916240:Jl1zAmGON:m:1:3253819041:089A6200360A79D9C9B8412BDF468102:r "We’re asking for just a
couple of bucks - help Herschel finish the fight by giving $11 to Herschel. ")**

Herschel wasn't planning on playing defense this late in the season, but with your help, he can retake a crucial Senate seat and fire Raphael Warnock.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Being honest with you 📩

body:
America can't handle this loss
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911798:6pzXAmG6N:m:1:3371220873:583DEC500CB06D5491D638A157C3FF1C:r)
---
| |
Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911798:6pzXAmG6N:m:1:3371220873:583DEC500CB06D5491D638A157C3FF1C:r "so I need
your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_

I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, _**[so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911798:6pzXAmG6N:m:1:3371220873:583DEC500CB06D5491D638A157C3FF1C:r "so can I count on you

subject: First ad of the runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916334:Jg3r1mGNN:m:1:3346849603:AC0C54A59016A0DE00EED137BEBCD495:r)

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916334:Jg3r1mGNN:m:1:3346849603:AC0C54A59016A0DE00EED137BEBCD495:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916334:Jg3r1mGNN:m:1:3346849603:AC0C54A59016A0DE00EED137BEBCD495:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916334:Jg3r1mGNN:m:1:3346849603:AC0C54A59016A0DE00EED137BEBCD495:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916334:Jg3r1mGNN:m:1:3346849603:AC0C54A59016A0DE00EED137BEBCD495:r)

P.S. clean_body: | Peter, Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel. We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election. He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad. But we have good news, for now... Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be. We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help? Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink. Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. Thanks, P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. This week, Donald Trump announced he’s running for president again. Here’s the deal, Peter. Grassroots supporters are the reason Donald Trump was _defeated_ in 2020. clean_body: Our fight -- both in the months and in the years ahead -- is far from over. Read on to see how our party is preparing for the work ahead → | | | This week, Donald Trump announced he’s running for president again. Here’s the deal, Peter. Grassroots supporters are the reason Donald Trump was defeated in 2020. Folks who chipped in back then are the reason we have control of the White House. And your support of the Democratic Party will be why Trumpism will continue to fail. Read on to see how our party is preparing for the work ahead → GEORGIA RUNOFF ELECTION UNDERWAY Peter, the Senate race in Georgia is headed to a runoff election -- and that means the result of this election depends on what we do between now and December 6. We’re racing against the clock to reach every voter, run statewide ads, and fuel important on-the-ground efforts so we can re-elect Raphael Warnock and expand our majority. But if this team digs deep and shows up the way you did to flip Georgia last cycle, we can win in Georgia and across the country. | | | | | BIPARTISAN INFRASTRUCTURE LAW: ONE YEAR LATER One year ago, President Biden signed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law -- a once-in-a-generation investment in our nation’s infrastructure and competitiveness. From replacing lead pipes and service lines to making high-speed internet more affordable and accessible, President Biden brought our nation into an infrastructure decade. Check out some of these investments → | | [LIMITED EDITION] “TRUTH OVER FLIES” FLY SWATTERS ON SALE NOW As a member of this grassroots team, we wanted you to be the first to see that we just re-launched our “Truth Over Flies” fly swatter. These were a fan favorite in 2020, and they’re selling fast! | | THANK YOU, Peter Because of the hard work and generosity of this grassroots team leading up to the midterm election, the DNC was able to invest nearly $90 million into states, organizing programs, voter protection, and Democratic staff across the country and to share our message directly with voters as early as last March. But our party’s work is far from over. While we’ve made incredible strides, we’re counting on this team to continue to invest in the programs that will elect Democrats in years to come. We are strong, but lasting political power means we have to get right back to work. More soon, Team Joe | |

name: Team AOC
subject: An email about marijuana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Marijuana pardons vs. expungements: what’s the difference, and how could it affect you or a loved one?
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221119-3632-header&t=1&akid=3632%2E2526796%2Er-bVmK)
**A lot of progress has been made on marijuana reform in the past month** — but, there’s still a lot that needs to be done.
In this email, **we’re going to get you up to speed on Biden’s recent executive order, the difference between marijuana pardons vs. expungements, and what steps Alexandria is calling for next** to ensure that _everyone_ is able to participate in society freely regardless of past marijuana possession.
**_The TL;DR:_**
On October 6, President Biden announced that he would pardon _some_ (not all) simple federal marijuana possession convictions.
While the intent of this executive order should be applauded, additional action is needed from Congress and state governments to actually realize the intent of this order. Let’s dive in!
**_What did Biden’s executive order do?_**
President Biden issued pardons for all prior federal offenses of simple possession of marijuana, not expungements – which are not necessarily in his purview – and that’s an important distinction. More on that later...
There are currently zero people in federal custody for simple possession of marijuana. So, in effect, no one was released from prison from this order.1
President Biden’s pardon only applied to _citizens_ with federal marijuana charges (of which there are about 6,500).2 Many immigrants applying for citizenship could continue to face deportation or other adverse consequences for possessing a substance that is now legal in many states.
For those eligible, the pardon will restore civic rights lost due to the felony conviction (like voting, or serving on juries), but only if the marijuana charge was the only felony on their record.
**_What is a pardon vs._****_expungement_**** _?_**
A pardon ends a prison sentence, but it doesn’t erase the charge from your record, only expungement can do that.
Pardons allow leaders to release someone who has been incarcerated. But an expungement is extremely important because it’s a judicial process that allows a person's partial or entire record to be concealed. **A pardon will reduce or decrease the penalty of a crime, but an expungement is what actually wipes that slate clean.**
If you pardon someone and they apply for a job for instance, the charge and the arrest is still on their record. Therefore, people with simple marijuana possessions are still being blocked from accessing housing, employment, financial aid for education, and other resources.
We must expunge records in addition to providing pardons.**Without expungement, a criminal record for marijuana use can still effectively bar you from participating in much of society.**
**_What’s next?_**
President Biden sent an important signal when he pardoned citizens with federal charges for simple marijuana possession. But there’s still a lot more to do.
Last year, Alexandria introduced a bipartisan bill with Congressman David Joyce (OH-14) calling for the federal government to create grants to hand to states and local municipalities in order to actually fulfill and carry through the process of expungement of criminal records for the tens of millions of Americans who have previously been convinced of marijuana offenses.
In addition, this week, Alexandria led a letter with Reps. Chuy Garcia and Ilhan Omar asking the President to pardon all simple marijuana possession offenses – regardless of immigration status – and reopen the immigration cases of those who were deported for marijuana-related offenses.
[**If you agree that no one should have their futures compromised because of marijuana possession, please chip in $3 to our campaign today to help Alexandria and our movement continue the fight for marijuana reform.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221119.pGzeGd&refcode=em20221119-3632-P_ENG_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3632%2E2526796%2Er-bVmK)
Thank you so much for reading.
Team AOC
P.S. Was this email helpful? Confusing? Let us know your thoughts below.
* * *

clean_body: Marijuana pardons vs. expungements: what’s the difference, and how could it affect you or a loved one? A lot of progress has been made on marijuana reform in the past month — but, there’s still a lot that needs to be done. In this email, we’re going to get you up to speed on Biden’s recent executive order, the difference between marijuana pardons vs. expungements, and what steps Alexandria is calling for next to ensure that everyone is able to participate in society freely regardless of past marijuana possession. The TL;DR: On October 6, President Biden announced that he would pardon some (not all) simple federal marijuana possession convictions. While the intent of this executive order should be applauded, additional action is needed from Congress and state governments to actually realize the intent of this order. Let’s dive in! What did Biden’s executive order do? President Biden issued pardons for all prior federal offenses of simple possession of marijuana, not expungements – which are not necessarily in his purview – and that’s an important distinction. More on that later... There are currently zero people in federal custody for simple possession of marijuana. So, in effect, no one was released from prison from this order.1 President Biden’s pardon only applied to citizens with federal marijuana charges (of which there are about 6,500).2 Many immigrants applying for citizenship could continue to face deportation or other adverse consequences for possessing a substance that is now legal in many states. For those eligible, the pardon will restore civic rights lost due to the felony conviction (like voting, or serving on juries), but only if the marijuana charge was the only felony on their record. What is a pardon vs.expungement ? A pardon ends a prison sentence, but it doesn’t erase the charge from your record, only expungement can do that. Pardons allow leaders to release someone who has been incarcerated. But an expungement is extremely important because it’s a judicial process that allows a person's partial or entire record to be concealed. A pardon will reduce or decrease the penalty of a crime, but an expungement is what actually wipes that slate clean. If you pardon someone and they apply for a job for instance, the charge and the arrest is still on their record. Therefore, people with simple marijuana possessions are still being blocked from accessing housing, employment, financial aid for education, and other resources. We must expunge records in addition to providing pardons.Without expungement, a criminal record for marijuana use can still effectively bar you from participating in much of society. What’s next? President Biden sent an important signal when he pardoned citizens with federal charges for simple marijuana possession. But there’s still a lot more to do. Last year, Alexandria introduced a bipartisan bill with Congressman David Joyce (OH-14) calling for the federal government to create grants to hand to states and local municipalities in order to actually fulfill and carry through the process of expungement of criminal records for the tens of millions of Americans who have previously been convinced of marijuana offenses. In addition, this week, Alexandria led a letter with Reps. Chuy Garcia and Ilhan Omar asking the President to pardon all simple marijuana possession offenses – regardless of immigration status – and reopen the immigration cases of those who were deported for marijuana-related offenses. Thank you so much for reading. Team AOC P.S. Was this email helpful? Confusing? Let us know your thoughts below. Extremely helpful | Somewhat helpful | Neutral/Not Applicable | Unhelpful | Very unhelpful ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- 1 - - | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

clean_body: | Peter — In honor of her decision to step down from leadership, I wanted to take a minute to offer a heartfelt thank you to Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Speaker Pelosi impressively led our Congress and our nation through some of the most difficult times in modern history: the COVID‐19 pandemic, an erratic Trump presidency, extremism on the right, and so much more. Speaker Pelosi always put the American people first, and did so with honor, grace, and strength. History will not soon forget her incredible leadership. | Thank you, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. name: Warnock HQ
subject: The first step to stopping Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#
_Note: This email is from Senator Raphael Warnock’s campaign. Sen. Warnock is in a competitive runoff election in Georgia against Herschel Walker._
This is urgent, team: **Donald Trump just announced he’s running for president in 2024.**
We MUST send a clear message this December that battleground Georgia will NOT be reclaimed by Trump and the GOP – and that starts with defeating Trump’s handpicked Senate candidate, Herschel Walker: [**So please, at this critical moment, will you rush $5 or more now to help Rev. Warnock keep Georgia blue?**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-warnock-split.lBAW6c&refcode=em221119-1-MA&t=1&akid=2274%2E357359%2Ed_Bm-C)
Trump knows that Democrats’ strength in Georgia in 2020 cost him the White House and delivered the Senate for Democrats. That’s why he’s laser-focused on this state and our toss-up Senate race – already holding multiple rallies and megadonor fundraisers with Walker to flip this seat.
Now, Trump just strategically launched his presidential campaign right before the runoff to mobilize the GOP base, try to swing the momentum in Walker’s favor, and turn Georgia red.
**We can fight back and win, but only with an immediate surge of grassroots energy of our own. GOP donors are pouring more than $37 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to defeat us and pave the way for Trump – and now, this race is neck and neck.** **We set a rapid-response goal to raise $1 million by midnight tonight so we can fight back and pull ahead – but right now, we’re dangerously short.**
[**So please, will you rush $5 or more before midnight to help Rev. Warnock defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-warnock-split.lBAW6c&refcode=em221119-1-MA&t=2&akid=2274%2E357359%2Ed_Bm-C)

---
****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2576?c0=cb-em-warnock-split.ObursT&refcode=em221119-1-MA&refcode2=2274.357359.d_Bm-C&t=23&akid=2274%2E357359%2Ed_Bm-C)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2569?c0=cb-em-warnock-split.N3-HS2&refcode=em221119-1-MA&refcode2=2274.357359.d_Bm-C&t=24&akid=2274%2E357359%2Ed_Bm-C)**

****

****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2573?c0=cb-em-warnock-split.S8PJOk&refcode=em221119-1-MA&refcode2=2274.357359.d_Bm-C&t=26&akid=2274%2E357359%2Ed_Bm-C)**

Thank you for stepping up in this critical moment,
Team Warnock

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=27&akid=2274%2E357359%2Ed_Bm-C). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2274%2E357359%2Ed_Bm-C).
