name: Candidate Spotlight (via Stand For America PAC)
subject: 5 seats you helped us flip
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
---
Republicans needed to flip FIVE seats to take back the House. We wanted to reach out and thank you for helping these FIVE candidates flip their seats and take back the House. Your support has not gone unnoticed. Because people like you stepped up, we have a few more incredible conservatives in Congress.
---
| |
---
| **Lori Chavez-DeRemer: OR-05** Lori Chavez-DeRemer is a wife, a mom, a small business owner, a former mayor, and now, a congresswoman-elect for Oregon’s 5th Congressional District.
---
| | As mayor, her commonsense solutions made Happy Valley the fastest-growing city in Oregon. She kept the city on a budget, lowered taxes, funded the police, and prioritized kids’ education. Democrats held this seat for 25 years leading up to Lori’s historic victory. She’s already proven she’s an effective leader who prioritizes the needs of the people she represents, and we know she’ll continue to do great in Congress.
---
| | **Jen Kiggans: VA-02** U.S. Navy veteran, geriatric nurse practitioner, mother, state senator, Navy wife — these are just some of the roles Jen Kiggans has had throughout her life. She’s built her experience around serving others.
---
|
---
| | In January, she’ll continue her career of service as congresswoman for Virginia’s 2nd Congressional District. Winning this seat was not an easy battle, but it was one she was ready to win. VA-02 is very competitive. It’s flipped back and forth between Republicans and Democrats four times since 2008 alone. But Virginians were tired of Democrats’ failed policies and know Jen Kiggans will bring conservative solutions to Washington.
---
| |
---
| **Zach Nunn: IA-03** Zach Nunn is a proud combat veteran, a husband, and a father of six. As a combat aviator with the US Air Force, Zach deployed three times to the Middle East, flying over 700 combat hours.
---
| | Zach Nunn is an American patriot and staunch conservative who Iowans proudly rallied behind. He flipped IA-03 back into Republican hands and we’re eager to see everything he accomplishes in Congress.
---
| | **Tom Kean Jr.: NJ-07 ** In 2020, the race in NJ-07 came down to just one point. This year, Tom Kean Jr. was ready to take on Democrat Tom Malinowski again, and flip this seat back into Republican hands. With help from people like you, he was able to do just that.
---
|
---
| | As the grandson of a former U.S. representative and son of a governor, Tom Kean knows what it means to lead a life dedicated to public service. Since 2001, he has been carrying on their legacy in the New Jersey General Assembly and the state Senate. Tom Kean is the voice New Jersey’s 7th Congressional District needs.
---
| |
---
| **Derrick Van Orden: WI-03** Derrick Van Orden is a Navy SEAL who has served multiple combat deployments during his time in the Navy. He’s a patriot who understands the greatness that America has to offer and the precious value of freedom.
---
| | When he saw the path America was headed on after the failed policies of the Left, he stepped up to serve in Congress. He knew the race would be an uphill battle — a Republican hasn’t won Wisconsin’s 3rd Congressional District in over 25 years. But he was ready to take on the Left and flip this seat, which is exactly what he did. Now he’s gearing up to take down the Biden agenda and fight for the people of WI-03.
---
| | |
---
[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=74b533762f414217907b6b57067c93cf&_e=_KHwNV1MEs_cGID_6F-oTs9giEod8SDTxy0kzxL0W_4DT_Il6T3p0-M2y3jQfiwiphyV_HCJzqc3kRDvZBhxHaKx4fsfaZdTWrUk0yoE3J4yMBVNZgR0uXWrJ7PldTkDDJ_Qy18ppyN3T6711wLbZrnkgKrH-0h_DHxxeGH9XGfN-jtYMJYsPTEJ14A8gFymTOqAOIX0OY0MS5ai61ka-HXyMu0MCXO7LvDZ9bcS9xAdtY3F5ij9-EBV15Esdlhl-r5kkywbBRLKiLP2zRotVMkuUCbvt4jXiJQ5vIZM6DxYS_5bVJ-PGsWvFIDq9uKmIIUeObKwxu0VLii7Yg6nUVbwbr5bVANMq6mBWlueQyBaKF7JUbydq7fUdHq2SE9b)

This work is far from over. **[If you want to help me continue my mission to stand for America and support conservatives who understand what’s at stake, I’m humbly asking for your donation today.](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=74b533762f414217907b6b57067c93cf&_e=_KHwNV1MEs_cGID_6F-oTs9giEod8SDTxy0kzxL0W_4DT_Il6T3p0-M2y3jQfiwiphyV_HCJzqc3kRDvZBhxHaKx4fsfaZdTWrUk0yoE3J4yMBVNZgR0uXWrJ7PldTkDDJ_Qy18ppyN3T6711wLbZrnkgKrH-0h_DHxxeGH9XGfN-jtYMJYsPTEJ14A8gFymTOqAOIX0OY0MS5ai61ka-HXyMu0MCXO7LvDZ9bcS9xCBgWmA7JhKkNeS4z7IBRsvOWMB7HVURcGmsEZIqNlBJPoE3xLTra3r-4xy96PESPZstjOhKDImJL6ToNURf8knUtZoKsLUXfYhDoyvOJUFmvs_Qhe1HGGimpiXrvMXx1YZ8Hx0s5XiBhRVXwWZWP0w) **

subject: Peter, who do you want in the White House?

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61912716:JAvPmmGpN:m:1:3253819041:1CAB4283A0F211619A9F0C4B551C8BCD:r)

Peter,

Who do you want running the country?

_Biden, a spinless hypocrite, and a lifelong career politician._

**Or Ron DeSantis -- a veteran, father and husband, and freedom fighter.**

Biden changes his stances to follow the political breeze. He has flip-flopped on issues like protecting our Southern border from illegal immigration to cater to the woke Left.

**Ron DeSantis has a clear track record of keeping his promises and standing firm on his principles.**

Peter, who do you want in the White House?

Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919644:6MJBmmGtN:m:1:3371220873:17F730F0D2BF9DFDA0AF8E4A1F9FA72F:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919644:6MJBmmGtN:m:1:3371220873:17F730F0D2BF9DFDA0AF8E4A1F9FA72F:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61919644:6MJBmmGtN:m:1:3371220873:17F730F0D2BF9DFDA0AF8E4A1F9FA72F:r)**

Thanks,

Folks,
We’ve been saying for weeks that the Georgia Senate race was going to be close, **and now Rev. Warnock has officially advanced to a runoff.**
We still have a chance to keep this seat blue and expand the Senate majority, but it’s going to take a lot of hard work and resources.
Unlike in the 2020 runoffs, we have just 17 days left to reach every single Democrat in Georgia and make sure they turn out to vote again, and with the GOP flooding Georgia with **MILLIONS** in attack ads in these final weeks, your support couldn't be more crucial.
The only way we can fight back against the GOP and their megadonors is if grassroots supporters like you pitch in so we can start things off on the right foot.
**[So please, friend, with the runoff election right around the corner, will you rush a donation, split between the Democratic Party of Georgia and Jacky Rosen, so we can stand against the GOP, defeat Herschel Walker, and keep Georgia Blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54842055/379817460/470961067?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2253-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2E2YjQ4Ni01NTY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sV-06MoM1f8DhSUtt-i8ndB2JbQDVMBUbmIsz0glRsI=)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: I want you to imagine an incredible moment: Senator Raphael Warnock is declared the winner in Georgia. The press is forced to cover how once again Donald Trump has been rejected by American people …
body:
Civil war in the GOP?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d13220a-92ad-49e0-b3c9-a769c677ff63/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | I want you to **imagine an incredible moment**. Senator **Raphael Warnock is declared the winner in Georgia**. The press is forced to cover how once again Donald Trump has been rejected by American people, in a swing state no less. He cost Republicans a majority, as another of his kooky candidates, Herschel Walker, has now lost. **([Can we, the Blue Amp Action Community, help make this a reality by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever we can afford to the Warnock for Senate campaign to ensure we gain a seat in the Senate?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4fd62c62-16db-45b7-bab8-8d1f4ec018a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))** The press must also cover how Mitch McConnell is also a loser. Not only did he not gain seats in a midterm when the opposing party had the presidency--a given!--he, in fact, lost a seat. He is weak, further from a majority, and has Josh Hawley openly challenging him, while Ted Cruz and Rick Scott are attacking his leadership. This all after 10 Republican Senators--or 1/5th of their caucus--voted against him as leader, something that's never happened to him before.
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03768ef2-27e3-43c0-853f-073b6c93f6d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | Imagine Trump & McConnell are fighting. McConnell & Rick Scott are fighting. Trump & DeSantis are fighting. McConnell & Peter Thiel are fighting. And this is all going on as Kevin McCarthy may not have the votes to be Speaker--with a razor-thin majority and two Republicans already saying they won't support him. **There are always ripple effects to any vote, and in this case, it could be outright civil war in the GOP** , while Democrats build a governing coalition that strengthens democracy, passes key progressive legislation and leads by example. **[But we need Senator Warnock to win December 6th for all this to happen. For Democrats to be on offense! Can we, the Blue Amp Action Community, help make this a reality by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever we can afford to the Warnock for Senate campaign to ensure we gain a seat in the Senate?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4a1e6f9-c4d6-4cfa-84ca-8846d7e5df09/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thank you for realizing the importance of this moment.
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a5d071b-c1d3-4d06-aab3-689322bb727f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---|---

---

---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/warnock-imaginevictory-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01111bc1-e4d9-400c-9027-896b64571570/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: 2024 will be here before you know it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J

It is with your help that: WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN. AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left. We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign. For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT! I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST Official 2024 Donor List TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend. Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. Hi there, About two weeks ago, Wes and Aruna were elected the next Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Maryland — and it wouldn’t have been possible without you! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54834991/379795977/-1532709219?refcode=fl_email_pt_20221119card_tmm_od30ds_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2M2MmRlMy0zMjY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZhaFjwjHZpysZ6Jynax4FE2dwfuRkepZ3aYm294IFYs=&emci=fe66b2dc-3268-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=93c62de3-3268-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=24635485)

Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916565:JCG4CmGNs:m:1:3370555685:616B30FDB3B3EEE370CC6D64734C411E:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916565:JCG4CmGNs:m:1:3370555685:616B30FDB3B3EEE370CC6D64734C411E:r)**

|

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911309:6YO4CmGN2:m:1:3373497171:3C19969DF84394D0A9B1E7DCD2C0CBF9:r)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: This isn't over... yet
body:
I’m writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. And today I need your help. |
---
| | Hi Friend,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I'm writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn.** And today I need your help.**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify on-demand abortion at taxpayers' expense.

**We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

Today I'd like to ask you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below:

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/sign-pro-life-statement/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=365afe683e034c3ab1999207d8fb4285&_e=pZ9jGjeYtl6IxxQ6fO_yQBqch5OUyM3X2TxaxEeCN2kfdRbCDEwpQ2Y7bAwI4JLEABMrbbMABo96nZZ0xZmJ3rdiBa2OeTJz4m4vJNhj3vd7jk1ktRqmV3SaFfpHjH_5DlujAFf-8XPMWD56yeAqryE31jc0Fo83mg-ld2xdisQ9n5ZfcEKtk4mgLgq5Kok4KHLiaV_O575R9G_FTXvYe46dnEWLOni-qiO30KBZXt2PeEMmaVwF5URE74b8U7OWogCnrqWWpQzJGdKls8_WjUPNcRVFu1JeRk_XKqfOJCSVxIpD2uFUKVLodXFblZhUTfYjv0ZEQp1XwBX7mLfmOv0kwOtcYp4-UWHSDC4OmcGmkXvRaXhfjjAlPieQyVeH)**

I will do everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. | | Team, **Here in Georgia, we’re hyper-focused on the US Senate Runoff Election — a pivotal test that will determine the strength of Democratic power and the volume of pro-democracy voices in the U.S. Senate.** Senator Raphael Warnock is running against anti-voter and anti-democracy candidate Herschel Walker — who promises to bring Donald Trump’s deeply problematic agenda to our doorstep, and whose extremist base could be newly emboldened by Trump’s presidential campaign announcement. But with your support, we’ll be ready to defeat him. Our team at Fair Fight is on the ground in full force, and we’ll continue working hard to ensure that every Georgian’s voice is heard and every ballot is counted in this upcoming runoff. It’s our mission to keep voting rights champions like Senator Warnock in office, because we know he’ll continue to advocate for our fundamental freedoms — and the same certainly can’t be said for his opponent. **Voters are already requesting mail-in ballots, early voting is about to start, and we need your help to reach as many Georgia voters as possible and get Senator Warnock across the finish line.**[_**Will you please chip in $20 to Fair Fight’s Georgia Runoff Fund to fuel our voter protection and turnout efforts at this crucial moment?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54842538/379819815/-941199594?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221119_f_f_stateofrace_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGM3Njc4Ni01ZjY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2gT7hokfzY8I8Sb9pBY9VoCTQkMZj53iJhqrDf2OnDk=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54842539/379819816/-941199594?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221119_f_f_stateofrace_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGM3Njc4Ni01ZjY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2gT7hokfzY8I8Sb9pBY9VoCTQkMZj53iJhqrDf2OnDk=)

In this year’s elections, voters were clear – they rejected anti-democracy candidates across the country — but a few like JD Vance and Ted Budd are still on their way to the Senate. That makes Senator Warnock’s pro-voter stance even more critical in Washington. It’s up to us to send him back to the Senate and strengthen our Democratic majority. **We’ve seen that a razor-thin margin in the Senate won’t cut it.**
In 2021, the Fair Fight team was critical in mobilizing support for Senator Warnock and getting him elected to the Senate. We’ve done it before, and with your help we’ll do it again.

clean_body: In 2021, the Fair Fight team was critical in mobilizing support for Senator Warnock and getting him elected to the Senate. We’ve done it before, and with your help we’ll do it again. | | | Team, Here in Georgia, we’re hyper-focused on the US Senate Runoff Election — a pivotal test that will determine the strength of Democratic power and the volume of pro-democracy voices in the U.S. Senate. Senator Raphael Warnock is running against anti-voter and anti-democracy candidate Herschel Walker — who promises to bring Donald Trump’s deeply problematic agenda to our doorstep, and whose extremist base could be newly emboldened by Trump’s presidential campaign announcement. But with your support, we’ll be ready to defeat him. Our team at Fair Fight is on the ground in full force, and we’ll continue working hard to ensure that every Georgian’s voice is heard and every ballot is counted in this upcoming runoff. It’s our mission to keep voting rights champions like Senator Warnock in office, because we know he’ll continue to advocate for our fundamental freedoms — and the same certainly can’t be said for his opponent. Voters are already requesting mail-in ballots, early voting is about to start, and we need your help to reach as many Georgia voters as possible and get Senator Warnock across the finish line.= | = In this year’s elections, voters were clear – they rejected anti-democracy candidates across the country — but a few like JD Vance and Ted Budd are still on their way to the Senate. That makes Senator Warnock’s pro-voter stance even more critical in Washington. It’s up to us to send him back to the Senate and strengthen our Democratic majority. We’ve seen that a razor-thin margin in the Senate won’t cut it. In 2021, the Fair Fight team was critical in mobilizing support for Senator Warnock and getting him elected to the Senate. We’ve done it before, and with your help we’ll do it again. = Thanks for everything, The Fair Fight Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2022 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. body:

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916587:JA1GbmGHN:m:1:3317145305:A975CFE1AE56D804787BC870F1C09B02:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916587:JA1GbmGHN:m:1:3317145305:A975CFE1AE56D804787BC870F1C09B02:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916587:JA1GbmGHN:m:1:3317145305:A975CFE1AE56D804787BC870F1C09B02:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916587:JA1GbmGHN:m:1:3317145305:A975CFE1AE56D804787BC870F1C09B02:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916587:JA1GbmGHN:m:1:3317145305:A975CFE1AE56D804787BC870F1C09B02:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916587:JA1GbmGHN:m:1:3317145305:A975CFE1AE56D804787BC870F1C09B02:r)

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: We can't let up for a second.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN VICTORY FUND
body:
| | | It's official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:** [_Will you split $10 or more right now between me and Zoe Lofgren to keep Georgia blue?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54839289/379801340/645567502?amount=10&sourceid=&refcode=LVF_EM_FR_3MO_20221119_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzkyZmFiOS0zOTY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BEK3098bLgttgVfnUgyy7JFouooaUPN0QRkLbm0HIXA=)

National Republicans are laser-focused on Georgia. GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million — and that's why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me.

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win — but with national Republicans going _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks — but we're falling short, and I need your help.**

[_Please, will you split a donation of $10 or more now between me and Zoe so we can win in Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54839290/379801341/645567502?amount=10&sourceid=&refcode=LVF_EM_FR_3MO_20221119_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzkyZmFiOS0zOTY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BEK3098bLgttgVfnUgyy7JFouooaUPN0QRkLbm0HIXA=)

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. That's why I'm humbly asking: = National Republicans are laser-focused on Georgia. GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million — and that's why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win — but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks — but we're falling short, and I need your help. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be immediately split between Lofgren Victory Fund and Raphael Warnock. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for all that you do. — Rev. name: Full Mag News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=586229f099d445dfa771e28a47f56beb&_e=OpeHh2KlaDQOBgmvrsQID04M6w-Q6Z5se63rP3dX8-Zfg0X2ObKa37lo627nXrsXPI71BWBOd3ad64_2dMMkPbLg2mH0XPY-jiL1Ya7MmNHs6kKdQpL-OGBdrxNNmKQ2wzQjUkSq8a1ZDLe-50OFg7X9gu05I6lKMeHJgJdHRXiZTsIwgKKeKbbcQAsoTuO8s1Xd5wddv2WXfJlvHgLQkU7FJZtlzA8Vm1QEdr65L1-yF852vu1Vr3JnFJyrzw735nWc8NeRWAq6p6q7vVc3lIzi091vBpDue2rmBvp39jnmMLjyVqr-cVMvn_Cc5hWXCi1tjLcZMO43dzUKm0hAqN65Y5hIbTcpSYpP3pqsM7lOOv0K6QrSU8WTmHDcMisFxMqkrzBNRVzrjvv4OBvwAw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=586229f099d445dfa771e28a47f56beb&_e=OpeHh2KlaDQOBgmvrsQID04M6w-Q6Z5se63rP3dX8-Zfg0X2ObKa37lo627nXrsXPI71BWBOd3ad64_2dMMkPbLg2mH0XPY-jiL1Ya7MmNHs6kKdQpL-OGBdrxNNmKQ2wzQjUkSq8a1ZDLe-50OFg7X9gu05I6lKMeHJgJdHRXiZTsIwgKKeKbbcQAsoTuO8s1Xd5wddv2WXfJlvHgLQkU7FJZtlzA8Vm1QEdr65L1_u-LRhak4Ql2CdcKk26RKRFFM_t8xQFUGadM9OUpflLinkZWyAiszNU1dV5j5-Vp4RGvOO6pogr4fc7dMIHZ1fYQBgfZBVcHdHjq8JZns4pD2LWRbknsgySGSpJv5C7q_ZdzDliHfs7XsurmdMOBdeRUQU3pAPy1InDUdX-ff0YA%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=586229f099d445dfa771e28a47f56beb&_e=OpeHh2KlaDQOBgmvrsQID04M6w-Q6Z5se63rP3dX8-Zfg0X2ObKa37lo627nXrsXPI71BWBOd3ad64_2dMMkPbLg2mH0XPY-jiL1Ya7MmNHs6kKdQpL-OGBdrxNNmKQ2wzQjUkSq8a1ZDLe-50OFg7X9gu05I6lKMeHJgJdHRXiZTsIwgKKeKbbcQAsoTuO8s1Xd5wddv2WXfJlvHgLQkU7FJZtlzA8Vm1QEdr65L1_SbfauIzTDkUUmuS-8GhJsxNJmtdLXWM2_0wnYMcWu-rpgsSS8O-ddTFrIq8zR0k0lbKU3_zLsK5Q3OwTnGE5IkPYZzrf8uMZx10Jmu4nLR0QalG-eU11y_J5ZttGX0eMcLPdZvFoFtzRMHJEVQV-774zrEHhlA_SD5jqqQSqaOg%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Full Mag News subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=586229f099d445dfa771e28a47f56beb&_t=DvhMZJk384FrSJm13TfwavHxdOqkE7WblruyioSPwQPvipgj0p6vU9t_CKEaWFmLJycKfie26jDyrD0NBwQAR6ZEYUgDc10GBSOcqcpW258%3D)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Pramila’s message is going viral >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Democrats need to be the proposition party — not just the opposition party.
#
Peter,
In case you missed it: Pramila was on with Joy Reid this week laying out exactly why the GOP is completely unprepared for the next Congress — and why progressives are.
Democrats outperformed all expectations of a ‘red wave’, winning race after race that Republicans thought were in the bag. **While they got cocky, we got organized.** Democrats had the best midterm showing in decades AND we elected the most progressives to Congress in recent history.
_**Now, the Republicans are in ruin.**_
That’s what Pramila said on MSNBC, and now people are talking about her message:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23469?refcode=em20221119-1864&t=1&akid=1864%2E420207%2EJFV7ek)
**The Republican Party will continue to tear itself apart — while Democrats and the Progressive Caucus will continue to deliver for the people.**
[**Any support you can give will fuel our work to keep Pramila’s critical work and the progressive agenda at the forefront in the next Congress. Can we count on you today, Peter?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23469?refcode=em20221119-1864&t=2&akid=1864%2E420207%2EJFV7ek)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23469?refcode=em20221119-1864&t=21&akid=1864%2E420207%2EJFV7ek)**
Pramila is front and center fighting for us now **just like she always has**. GOP majority or not, the work doesn’t stop. Pramila and our progressive bloc will not give up on the bold agenda that actually uplifts working people and tackles the crises we face.
Taking on the Republicans is important, but **_we have to be a proposition party, not just an opposition party_**. The GOP can’t even figure out who will lead them — much less an agenda that isn’t rooted in cruelty. But Pramila has led the fight for progressive causes since she was first elected.
[**Our grassroots movement has empowered Pramila from Day One to fight for us — and it’s your support that keeps our work going. If you can make a donation and show you stand with Pramila today, we’d deeply appreciate it.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23469?refcode=em20221119-1864&t=22&akid=1864%2E420207%2EJFV7ek)
Thank you,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221119-1864-footer&t=23&refcode2=1864_420207_JFV7ek&akid=1864%2E420207%2EJFV7ek)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

The GOP can’t even figure out who will lead them — much less an agenda that isn’t rooted in cruelty. But Pramila has led the fight for progressive causes since she was first elected. Thank you, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Ken Burns
subject: Rev. Warnock is the kind of leader we need in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
I've spent more than four decades making films that tell the stories of America’s greatest challenges
| | |
---
I've spent more than four decades making films that tell the stories of America’s greatest challenges – from the Civil War to the Dust Bowl, from the Second World War to the Vietnam War.

In each of these historic moments, we were challenged to live up to the essential promise of our nation, preserving a democratic system of government that respects the rights and addresses the needs of all its citizens. Today, such challenges to our democracy are rampant. That's why I'm reaching out.
In Georgia's Senate runoff election, Rev. Raphael Warnock is running against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, one who stands against the very democratic values that make up the fabric of our nation.
This race will come down to the narrowest of margins, and wealthy GOP donors have already poured millions into an effort to turn Georgia red.
I believe that Rev. Warnock is the kind of leader we need in Washington to uphold our democracy and move our country forward. I believe that he can win this race, and **[I'm asking you to dig deep and help ensure that Rev. Warnock has the resources he needs to fight back against the GOP and turn out voters in every corner of Georgia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54840000/379804647/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5122-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTMyZjcxMS0zZDY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRjKMhDjQKULgscQ4VOGZWOmQBa9DphB1kK-BNvDtFk=)**
Thank you,

Ken

body:

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916522:6BkHlmGdN:m:1:3369487795:1A7B156386CB0E0FE91B90C89A5F63E1:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916522:6BkHlmGdN:m:1:3369487795:1A7B156386CB0E0FE91B90C89A5F63E1:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916522:6BkHlmGdN:m:1:3369487795:1A7B156386CB0E0FE91B90C89A5F63E1:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916522:6BkHlmGdN:m:1:3369487795:1A7B156386CB0E0FE91B90C89A5F63E1:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916522:6BkHlmGdN:m:1:3369487795:1A7B156386CB0E0FE91B90C89A5F63E1:r)**

clean_body: | Peter, Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel. We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election. He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad. But we have good news, for now... Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be. We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help? Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink. Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. Thanks, P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. subject: Being honest with you

body:
America can't handle this loss
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911832:JgW_lmGzN:m:1:3372944669:6AE4BD7E702B96B03F83382827ACA2CF:r)
---
| |
Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911832:JgW_lmGzN:m:1:3372944669:6AE4BD7E702B96B03F83382827ACA2CF:r "so I need
your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_

name: Herschel Walker HQ
subject: This is who Herschel Walker is…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916614:J0Dq2mGzN:m:1:3317145305:510F391E26DA34BE66D7DAA687262590:r)

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916614:J0Dq2mGzN:m:1:3317145305:510F391E26DA34BE66D7DAA687262590:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916614:J0Dq2mGzN:m:1:3317145305:510F391E26DA34BE66D7DAA687262590:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916614:J0Dq2mGzN:m:1:3317145305:510F391E26DA34BE66D7DAA687262590:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916614:J0Dq2mGzN:m:1:3317145305:510F391E26DA34BE66D7DAA687262590:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916614:J0Dq2mGzN:m:1:3317145305:510F391E26DA34BE66D7DAA687262590:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916614:J0Dq2mGzN:m:1:3317145305:510F391E26DA34BE66D7DAA687262590:r)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Raphael Warnock’s campaign needs your support to get their message out on television, on the radio, and online, as well as to keep contacting voters on the phone and at the door.
body:
Warnock knows how to win
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d42ebcd-7f13-4a44-a35c-1f2acf049c95/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_If there is anyone who knows how to win a race in Georgia, it is Senator Raphael Warnock. It may be hard to believe, but he's won 3 statewide elections in Georgia in just 2 years!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d54e7b4-77de-426c-98ce-a90acef4a6ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_The special election in November of 2020, the runoff January 5th, 2021 and November 8th. Now we know if he has the resources, he'll do it again on December 6th, when he takes on Herschel Walker, whose latest speech debated whether vampires or werewolves would win in a fight (I wish I were kidding. I am not. I guess he cherished "The Twilight Saga")._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Raphael Warnock for Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcbc50e27-587b-4a49-9c16-9c473b802f3a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Still, Senator Warnock has been falling behind in fundraising every day, and a Republican campaign group just announced another $14 million to run ads against him._** **We must do all we can to help him make up the ground. Or instead of Georgia's Senator being a scholar who bestrides a pulpit once occupied by Martin Luther King, Jr., it may become someone who's brain is occupied by werewolf vs vampire battles.** Raphael Warnock’s campaign needs your support to get their message out on television, on the radio, and online, as well as to keep contacting voters on the phone and at the door. **[Can you please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Senator Raphael Warnock, so he can make up his fundraising shortfall today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9e9c29d-b1ba-4935-b29e-ab0c3758b429/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thank you, Blue Amp Action Community!**
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48751fbe-d3e3-4352-bd8d-205e8657848f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb6934e8-317e-42fc-b0fe-83272685f4d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916470:625-EmGNc:m:1:3368395361:92FC0C0020DCF88D5195AC129E6DF5D0:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916470:625-EmGNc:m:1:3368395361:92FC0C0020DCF88D5195AC129E6DF5D0:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916470:625-EmGNc:m:1:3368395361:92FC0C0020DCF88D5195AC129E6DF5D0:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916470:625-EmGNc:m:1:3368395361:92FC0C0020DCF88D5195AC129E6DF5D0:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916470:625-EmGNc:m:1:3368395361:92FC0C0020DCF88D5195AC129E6DF5D0:r)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: lame duck
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1377%2E5257348%2E04CReb ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

Republicans gerrymandered their way to the House majority. And Democrats
overperformed to keep it close. That’s the truth.

GOP legislatures spent the last two years since the 2020 Census
eliminating Democratic districts with illegal maps and defying court
orders to redraw them leading up to the 2022 election.

Their gerrymanders were their only saving grace from a historic Republican
flop on November 8th. Here’s how it happened:

In Florida, Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis’s map gave the GOP four new House
seats and eliminated the seats of two Black lawmakers. A state judge
tossed out the map, calling it a “racist gerrymander.” DeSantis appealed
to the state Supreme Court, stacked with his appointees, and pushed it
through.

GOP pickups by gerrymander: 4

Tennessee Republicans broke Nashville’s Black community into multiple
House districts, diluting their voting power and eliminating another
Democratic seat.

GOP pickups by gerrymander: 5

Ohio defied a panel of federal judges that ruled their congressional map
was a partisan gerrymander and used the illegal map, giving Republicans
another House seat.

GOP pickups by gerrymander: 6

Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana violated the Voting Rights Act with racist
gerrymanders that denied voters three additional Black-majority districts
— one in each state.

GOP pickups by gerrymander: 9

Very few House Democrats actually lost their re-elections — Republicans
gained more seats by running in new, gerrymandered districts than by
challenging Democratic incumbents.

Derek, this is why I’ve pushed for the Senate to pass our House
legislation, the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the For
the People Act. Republicans have made voter suppression a means to their
end of controlling government. That goes against everything our democracy
is supposed to be. And we cannot allow it to continue.

These pieces of legislation, passed by our Democratic House and buried by
Mitch McConnell’s filibuster in the Senate, would set clear standards with
independent redistricting commissions and the restoration of federal
preclearance for maps in states with a history of voting rights
violations.

It would expand voting rights with automatic and same-day registration,
and expand options to vote-by-mail and vote early. Additionally, it would
prevent purging of voter rolls, rein in our out-of-control campaign
finance system created by Citizens United, and strengthen election
security.

Some Senate Democrats have been reluctant to abolish the filibuster.
That’s a tragic mistake. And this month’s election results show how urgent
this matter is to guarantee fair and equal representation in Congress.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221119-voting-rights-petition-vsp.ksZqJk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221119_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1377%2E5257348%2E04CReb ]We. Must. Act. Now.

We have limited time in the lame duck session of Congress before
Republicans take over the House majority to address these glaring issues
that are eroding our democracy.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221119-voting-rights-petition-vsp.ksZqJk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221119_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1377%2E5257348%2E04CReb ]Derek, add your name to my petition calling on Senate
Democrats to abolish the filibuster and pass our House legislation during
the lame duck session to strengthen voting rights and abolish partisan
gerrymandering while we still have a chance.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221119-voting-rights-petition-vsp.ksZqJk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221119_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1006&akid=1377%2E5257348%2E04CReb ]ADD YOUR NAME

We cannot afford to wait. There is no telling what extreme lengths that
House Republicans will go to in order to sabotage and stall the Biden
administration’s efforts.

Conducting the 2024 election with states using the same illegal maps they
manipulated into handing Republicans the House majority is not an option.

Derek, this is so important, so I will ask one more time:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20221119-voting-rights-petition-vsp.ksZqJk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221119_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1007&akid=1377%2E5257348%2E04CReb ]Please, add your name to join me in calling on Senate Democrats to take
up the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the For the People
Act today.

Thanks for raising your voice on this important matter.

— Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=1377%2E5257348%2E04CReb ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=1377%2E5257348%2E04CReb ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1377%2E5257348%2E04CReb

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Being honest with you 🔗
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
America can't handle this loss
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911836:JhB9EmGNs:m:1:3374012347:2B188A018DCFA8F5DF9DEC563934D5EA:r)
---
| |
Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911836:JhB9EmGNs:m:1:3374012347:2B188A018DCFA8F5DF9DEC563934D5EA:r "so I need
your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_

| | | Democrats are already salivating about the liberal policies Raphael Warnock will help them pass in a Democrat-led Senate.

You and I must work together to stop this from happening. The path to victory is clear. The question is, will you help me get that victory, Peter?

I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, _**[so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61911836:JhB9EmGNs:m:1:3374012347:2B188A018DCFA8F5DF9DEC563934D5EA:r "so can I count on you

You and I must work together to stop this from happening. The path to victory is clear. The question is, will you help me get that victory, Peter? I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, "so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?" | | | | To victory, Herschel Walker U.S. Senate Candidate | | Paid for by Stand for America PAC. subject: I’m personally asking you for a favor Peter

body:
|

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61916390:6NaeEmGN9:m:1:3253819041:E6EE8CDF0119C87B2993CB01896AAB46:r)**

name: Leah Donahey, LCV
subject: Add your name: Now is the time for President Biden to go BIG on climate action.
body:
Help us reach our goal: 10,000 actions. |
---
| | **
Tell President Biden:
Now is the time to go BIG on climate action **
The past two years have shown us how challenging it can be to enact climate legislation by the slimmest of pro-environment majority margins. And next year, we're facing a narrow anti-climate majority in the House -- but President Biden has the authority to take executive action _right now_.

**Tell President Biden: Use your authority to take bold executive action that addresses the climate crisis.
GOAL: 10,000 ACTIONS**
|
---
**[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

** **
|
Peter -- as the final outcomes are still being determined in extremely close Congressional races, it's clear we'll have an anti-climate majority take control of the House next year. And as their words and plans indicate, they're likely to derail progress on climate and clean energy at every step of the way for their cronies in Big Oil.

But even with Big Oil sympathizers narrowly in power in the House, there is progress to be made. [Now is the time for President Biden to use his authority to act on climate.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/z9e0fb6Y0~h_)

These are just a few of the actions we're asking President Biden to take:

1. **Declare a climate emergency**. This could make additional federal funding available to address the climate crisis, support clean energy solutions, and advance environmental justice.
2. **Require companies to disclose climate-related risks**. Federal rules require companies to disclose financial risks to investors -- including anyone with a 401(k) account. But right now, they aren't yet required to disclose climate risks, which are becoming bigger and bigger liabilities. It's time for the Securities and Exchange Commission to close the loophole.
3. **Protect clean air and water**. The executive branch has the power to set environmental and public health standards that ensure clean air and water. President Biden has the power to strengthen those standards -- he should use it right now.

[Will you join us in urging President Biden to take bold action to address the climate crisis and reduce pollution? Help us reach our goal to deliver 10,000 messages. Add your name today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/z9e0fb6Y0~h_)

Earlier this year, the environmental movement made history by helping to pass the Inflation Reduction Act -- Congress's largest-ever investment in climate action -- into law.

That legislation will give us cleaner, more affordable energy and transportation, and healthier communities, _but it won 't get us all the way there on its own_. To truly overcome the climate crisis and the magnitude of its challenges, we need to take bold action on all possible fronts.

President Biden has the authority to act _without additional legislation from Congress_. **He must use his executive authority to pursue clean energy, advance environmental justice, and combat the impact of climate change.**

[Please add your name today. Together, we can show President Biden that the people are not divided on this issue. He can and must take action -- but it will only happen if we demand it. Help us reach our goal today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/z9e0fb6Y0~h_)

Thank you, Peter. It's because of steadfast support from people like you that we're finally making progress in the fight against climate change. We can't turn back now.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
|

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=8930384&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDQwMzQwNwS2&spReportId=MTYyMDQwMzQwNwS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=8930384&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTYyMDQwMzQwNwS2&spReportId=MTYyMDQwMzQwNwS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/vNR6feV0-) |

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Every seat we win makes it more likely McCarthy won't be Speaker, the GOP won't be able to agree on any candidate and Democrats can join Bacon and perhaps a half dozen to a dozen sane Republicans to form a power sharing agreement, where progressive legislation we care about can get a vote.
body:
House leadership is up for grabs
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf150f01d-5ad8-4806-b01e-b1fd17410698/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **WE HAVE A FEW RACES LEFT THAT WE MUST DELIVER** **[Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b9b7abc-3f4b-4e47-a585-9a2d2059d3db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Republicans are now expected to have a 5-7 vote edge in the House. Two of those votes, lunatics Andy Biggs & Matt Gaetz, have promised to will NEVER vote for Kevin McCarthy as leader. 31 voted for Biggs over McCartthy in a leadership contest. And Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, who is one of the more normal Republicans, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats if McCarthy doesn't have the votes._** **__This all adds up to something simple: Every seat we win makes it more likely McCarthy won't be Speaker, the GOP won't be able to agree on any candidate and Democrats can join Bacon and perhaps a half dozen to a dozen sane Republicans to form a power sharing agreement, where progressive legislation we care about can get a vote.__** **_One of the races still outstanding is California's 22nd Congressional District, a seat long held by Democrats, but taken over in 2020 by Republican David Valadao. Democrat Rudy Salas is currently within 4,000 votes with an entire 25% of the vote left to count. A political science professor in the area was quoted saying she expects the race to be decided by 100, maybe 1000 votes at most._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Support the CA-22 count!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted7039ee-3423-4184-b5f2-fc26a9a6dc91/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_We must ensure Salas has the funds for staff & lawyers for what might be another week or two, so every vote is counted, we can take this seat and make it less likely there is a Speaker McCarthy, and more likely a power sharing arrangement that ensures the issues we care about don't get buried._** **[Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94729fa9-a0ff-4026-9468-9099af08546d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Thank you to all the members of the Blue Amp Action Community who keep showing they intend to take every seat we can._** **_Cliff_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Donate Now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T767ff49a-696e-4221-887c-fae4c4912e75/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff1e2d7d-4e2b-4035-837e-e4cb1f7fe47a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: South Bay CRA
subject: SBCRA Nov 28th The Left is trying to Cancel our Meeting
body:
SBCRA MEETING Nov 28th DOORS OPEN@6:30 SHARP El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA South Bay CRA News We need all hands on d
| |
---
|
---
## SBCRA MEETING Nov 28th DOORS OPEN@6:30 SHARP El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
---
---
|
---
# **South Bay CRA News**
**We need all hands on deck for our Monthly South Bay CRA meeting. The left is trying to cancel us by complaining about us to the Library staff and threatening to protest our meeting. We need you all to come out in numbers to prove to the City of El Segundo that we will not be pushed around and will not be canceled. Please come and bring friends Monday the 28th door opens at 6:30pm.**
# In other News:
The 14th of November we had an endorsement meeting with delegates from all the clubs in Los Angeles county present. Davina Keiser, Rick Marshall and one other gentleman ( I don't have his name) were endorsed to run for seats on LAGOP board.
# Christmas Party
The South Bay club and the Torrance, Lomita, Palos Verdes club will be holding a joint Christmas party Saturday December 10th 6pm-9pm suggested donation of $10 please also sign up to bring a side dish. Turkey and Ham will be provided. We will be giving out awards and it's also the last day to turn in toys for the outreach we are doing.
**Christmas Party Dec 10th 6pm-9pm Walteria Business Club24004 Neece Ave Torrance, CA**
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## Nov 28th Monthly Meeting
---
|
---
# Derrick Gates
**Derrick Gates will be talking about cancel culture and the dangers of falling prey to the left's agenda to silence the conservative voices.**
Derrick Gates is a local business owner, film maker, pastor and 2022 CRA endorsed congressional candidate for the CA-36th. Derrick is the president of the New Breed Conservatives an organization dedicated to waking up local churches and get them mobilized to join the fight for our Nation.
|
---
# Mahlone Becker
A graduate of UCLA, Mahlone Becker is the President of the South Bay Rep Women Federated. She spent her career in aviation as the Chief Pilot of Jet Demonstrations for Raytheon. As manufacturers pilot she traveled the world doing demonstration flights for sales. After the birth of her third child it was too much to juggle. Between her piloting career and being present for her child as well as her husband it was overwhelming so she hung up her wings.
As the kids aged she was able to focus on some other activities and became passionate about shotgun shooting. She went on to become an NRA Shotgun instructor and enjoys shooting sporting clay tournaments. She is always happy to share her skills and holds beginning shooting classes from time to time.
---
|
---
# JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!
[CLICK TO JOIN THE SOUTH BAY CRA](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=80864.149.1.935a46177243b23e8155c48bd4686216)
| |
---
---
## STOP FEEDING THE RINOS!!

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3ba4077b860d4a6892cb8b47d9224524&_e=I_JiID3rizBPCS4PWJrNCLZBNA-E0xb4CR1-lyRTi0i5m7pYttAo2IIPpIX_hgZty1W3LANFWnt7XQeYJaOyvHiWCvejwQq1eUiLUZEgK-5PwkN2p_2HAWet220SoWOtfFw882VN21BEJWH3SCQ92J6Kmxe6odLRO0u5kGijpvJeQHLO3uwimoYbbSeJA-rZUibcNtr3kB8VLzGQiaS-YchspRcJ-ZIr1lz3dLNcm8dFKDkfRssOVUy5CCtYI3C98VWb2ZFqCR9ClSi1l9xhGZFu2xZZDZ4XlauqWGJiZBff9Z7m3hQDauQcSgJ409C4675b2JPaars0jtZ4g0Xl1pOrJ6gwgLP46EjuAm2fbgCqsRrURFb1ARAnNnf5LrtXtRdTGrHy4bdTNq-JWxTZ9grWT-kXSxwkK-LS81_DHjmwP5Pe5NVlMxz9tnm8kpsU)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3ba4077b860d4a6892cb8b47d9224524&_e=I_JiID3rizBPCS4PWJrNCLZBNA-E0xb4CR1-lyRTi0i5m7pYttAo2IIPpIX_hgZty1W3LANFWnt7XQeYJaOyvHiWCvejwQq1eUiLUZEgK-5PwkN2p_2HAWet220SoWOtfFw882VN21BEJWH3SCQ92J6Kmxe6odLRO0u5kGijpvJeQHLO3uwimoYbbSeJA-rZUibcNtr3kB8VLzGQiaS-YchspRcJ-ZIr1lz3dLNcm8dFKDkfRssOVUy5CCtYI3C98VWb2ZFqCR9ClSi1l9xhGZFu2xZZDZ4XlauqWGJiZBeaaJRqmBQYMdUETh-FZudlAlw3e55NhVK2Hc3Y818xukGr6HdpWIIlQcEWY6cXSiIfYJxl4Ouuw_j72SkC_Nw8tr4tb93jTImWIUQ7p6Oe5faoveECEp4vAykDhoBwNcpwmdnhgJb-V31-x91nWP4R)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathan=20Hochman?=
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
Let me start with this: Thank You. When I declared to run for California Attorney General over 18 months ago, I could not imagine the incredible supp | | |
---
| | Hi Peter ,

Let me start with this: Thank You. When I declared to run for California Attorney General over 18 months ago, I could not imagine the incredible support, advice, passion, generosity, and commitment that you and thousands of others would share with me to help change California and restore its safety and security.

Unfortunately, we did not win this race. I have wished Attorney General Bonta great success in running the California Department of Justice because as Californians first and foremost, we need him to succeed in addressing skyrocketing violent and street crime, the homeless crisis, and the fentanyl epidemic. We can’t wait four years to see this happen and must hope that he will listen to our message, work with us to implement real solutions, and put Californians’ interests first over politics.

Together, we accomplished something truly extraordinary. We smashed statewide fundraising records for a Republican Attorney General candidate. We traveled up and down this state, engaging with communities that had rarely heard from a statewide Republican candidate before. We won 31 out of 58 counties (see orange-colored counties below) and over 4 million votes (and counting). We elevated the conversation on fentanyl, human trafficking, crime, and homelessness. We held Sacramento accountable for the public safety crisis we face.

This message grew and reverberated around California because of all the time, generosity, and energy of all my supporters, donors, and campaign team. It takes a village to raise a family in this world, and it definitely takes one to run a campaign. Thank you.

No campaign can succeed at any level if the candidate does not have the love and support of his family. In this respect, I have succeeded beyond all expectations. My wife Vivienne is the unsung hero for treating the campaign as her own and infusing it with her creativity, common sense, and commitment. I am similarly incredibly lucky to have had by my side my children Tyler, Harrison and Brynn, my mother Harriet, and my siblings David, Nancy and Jennifer.

My fight to restore public safety in our state and communities has only begun. I look forward to finding opportunities to work with you to make this world a better place. For now, I wish you and your family a healthy, safe, happy and prosperous holiday season.

With gratitude,

Nathan Hochman
---
| |
---
| | Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
FPPC ID 1437955

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5e18d418e9&e=94837ebab3&c=856fabea59) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5e18d418e9&e=94837ebab3&c=856fabea59).
---

clean_body: 2024 will be OUR YEAR Friend, BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO. After much speculation, my father has officially confirmed the news we have all been waiting for: MY FATHER IS RUNNING TO BE THE NEXT PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES IN 2024. My father was truly the greatest President of all time. Under his historic leadership, he put America FIRST and made our Nation the strongest it has ever been. With everything Joe Biden and the radical Left have thrown our way these past few years, the American People desperately need a President they can count on, which is EXACTLY why my father is running to be our Nation's 47th President. Friend, regardless of everything the Democrats have done to thwart our crucial efforts, you've always remained by my father's side and put the needs of our Party above EVERYTHING ELSE. Because of this, I'm inviting YOU to go down in history as one of his first Official 2024 Presidential Founders. As an Official 2024 Presidential Founder, you will help my father ramp up his efforts for 2024 and take a stand against the radical Left. With YOUR contribution, you can help my father get ahead of the radical Left as he works to SAVE AMERICA and become ourNation 's 47th President. Thank you, Eric Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | | **$25** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today, Peter.

Your $25 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.

Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With less than 30 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.

**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $25 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please, Peter: Will you split $25 now between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia?**

**Here's a special link just for you:_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dpg_split_warnock?refcode=20221119.5_RW_A32&amount=25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54842739/379820968/1583625711?refcode=20221119.5_RW_A32&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTc5ODhkYS02NTY4LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zld4Ld6_0iIUfxJl26hvdfjgOCHS5lD16MfNOlOdlK8=)_**

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
